Result: 在Qiskit上的VQE和QAOA MaxCut实例中，失败引导的局部模糊测试是性能提升的主要驱动力；符号执行种子发现对VQE有额外收益，但对QAOA效果不稳定。

Conclusion: 复用失败信息是HQC测试的一个有前景的方向，但符号执行种子发现的价值依赖于具体工作负载。

Abstract: Hybrid quantum-classical (HQC) algorithms, such as the Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) and the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA), are central to near-term quantum computing but remain challenging to test. Sampling-based fuzzing can expose faulty or non-convergent configurations, but under realistic execution budgets, it may miss failure-prone regions in the joint space of classical optimizer settings and quantum circuit parameters.
  This paper studies failure-guided fuzzing for HQC programs. It models a hybrid input as a pair of classical optimizer hyperparameters and quantum circuit parameters, and evaluates a two-phase strategy that first searches for non-convergent seeds and then locally fuzzes circuit parameters around those seeds. To understand where the gains come from, five budgeted strategies are compared: random hybrid testing, classical enumeration without fuzzing, random-seed local fuzzing, enumeration-seed local fuzzing, and concolic-seed local fuzzing. The study is implemented on a VQE instance and a QAOA MaxCut instance in Qiskit. The results show that failure-guided local fuzzing is the main driver of improvement over random testing, while concolic seed discovery provides additional benefits on VQE but is less stable on QAOA. These findings suggest that reusing failure information is a promising direction for HQC testing, but that the value of concolic seed discovery is workload-dependent.

</details>


### [219] [Making OpenAPI Documentation Agent-Ready: Detecting Documentation and REST Smells with a Multi-Agent LLM System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14312)
*Rayfran Rocha Lima,Davi G. Assunção Pinheiro,Thiago Medeiros de Menezes*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了在微服务生态系统中，将现有REST API通过MCP协议暴露给AI代理时所遇到的系统性失败问题。作者开发了Hermes——一个多智能体LLM系统，用于检测OpenAPI文档中的缺陷，并在600个端点中识别出2,450个"气味"（问题点）。研究发现，结构有效的API在语义上并不一定准备好被AI代理使用，促使组织修订了API采纳策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管现有REST API在微服务架构中稳定且广泛使用，但早期实验发现，通过MCP协议暴露给AI代理后，在任务规划、工具选择和负载构建方面出现了系统性失败。作者怀疑问题不仅源于模型局限，更指向底层API文档的质量缺陷，因此需要对OpenAPI文档进行大规模实证评估。

Method: 作者开发了Hermes，一个基于多智能体LLM的系统，能够在端点级别检测文档和REST相关的"气味"（代码/文档中的潜在问题），并生成可解释的诊断报告。研究针对16个生产API（约600个端点）进行了大规模评估。

Result: 在600个端点中识别出2,450个问题点，所有被分析的操作都存在缺陷。从业者验证确认了检测到的问题，但也揭示了修复决策中的上下文权衡。结果表明，微服务环境中的结构有效性不能保证AI代理消费的语义就绪性。

Conclusion: 基于研究证据，该组织修订了AI采纳策略，优先进行选择性端点适配、重新定义文档标准，并将自动化文档评估纳入API治理流程。本文表明，系统性的artifact级评估可以作为战略性决策支持机制，降低技术风险并指导工业软件生态系统中的循证AI采纳。

Abstract: The growing adoption of AI agents and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) has motivated organizations to expose existing REST APIs as agent-consumable tools. In our industrial context, this initiative targeted an ecosystem of 16 production APIs comprising approximately 600 endpoints. Although these APIs were stable and widely used within a microservice architecture, early proof-of-concept experiments revealed systematic failures in task planning, tool selection, and payload construction when accessed through MCP-based agents. Rather than attributing these failures to model limitations alone, we conducted an ecosystem-scale empirical assessment of the underlying OpenAPI documentation. We developed Hermes, a multi-agent LLM-based system that detects documentation and REST-related smells at the endpoint level and generates explainable diagnostic reports. The large-scale evaluation identified 2,450 smells across 600 endpoints, with deficiencies present in all analyzed operations. Practitioner validation confirmed high agreement with the detected issues while also revealing contextual trade-offs in remediation decisions. The findings suggested that structural validity within microservice environments does not guarantee semantic readiness for agent-based consumption. Based on this evidence, the organization revised its adoption strategy, prioritizing selective endpoint adaptation, redefining documentation standards, and integrating automated documentation assessment into API governance workflows. This case illustrates how systematic artifact-level evaluation can function as a strategic decision-support mechanism, reducing technological risk and guiding evidence-based AI adoption in industrial software ecosystems.

</details>


### [220] [Correctness-Aware Repository Filtering Under Maximum Effective Context Window Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14362)
*Shweta Mishra*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种正确性感知的上下文卫生框架（SizeFilter/HybridFilter），通过OS级stat()元数据在词元化前过滤仓库中的大文件，无需索引即可实现高词元压缩率和低延迟。实验表明该过滤器能显著提升LLM在代码任务中的准确率并降低幻觉率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM的实际有效上下文窗口远小于其广告宣称的限制，而现代软件仓库中包含大量非代码大文件（如编译数据集、二进制模型权重、JavaScript包、日志文件等），这些大文件会迅速填满上下文窗口并挤掉任务相关的源代码，导致模型准确率下降。现有语义检索方法（如RepoCoder、GraphRAG）需要索引构建和查询时推理，成本较高。

Method: 提出了一种正确性感知的上下文卫生框架，包含两种过滤器：SizeFilter（基于文件大小的阈值过滤，θ=1 MB）和HybridFilter（结合大小和其他启发式规则的混合过滤器。该方法在词元化之前拦截仓库扫描，仅通过OS级别的stat()元数据获取文件大小信息，实现亚毫秒级决策（<0.01 ms/文件），无需索引和语义推理。

Result: 在10个开源仓库（22,046个文件，5种语言）上，SizeFilter（θ=1 MB）实现平均79.6%的词元压缩率，开销仅0.30 ms；HybridFilter达到89.3%的词元压缩率，且方差最小（±9.0%）。词元密度分析显示强线性相关（Pearson r=0.997, k=0.250 tokens/byte）。在18个任务上，过滤后的文件级准确率为72%，基线仅为25%；幻觉率从61%降至17%。

Conclusion: 基于文件大小的简单启发式过滤方法在上下文构建中非常有效，能显著提升LLM代码任务的准确率并降低幻觉率。该方法无需索引、延迟极低、易于部署，是对现有语义检索方法的有效补充。代码和数据已开源。

Abstract: Context window efficiency is a practical constraint in large language model (LLM)-based developer tools. Paulsen [12] shows that all tested models degrade in accuracy well before their advertised context limits the Maximum Effective Context Window (MECW) which makes context construction a quality problem, not just a cost one. Modern software repositories routinely contain large non-code artifacts compiled datasets, binary model weights, minified JavaScript bundles, and gigabyte-scale log files that overflow the context window and push out task-relevant source code. We present a correctness-aware context hygiene framework: a pre-execution, size-based heuristic filter that intercepts repository scans before tokenization, using only OS-level stat() metadata with sub-millisecond overhead. Semantic retrieval approaches such as RepoCoder, GraphRAG, and AST-based chunking require index construction and query-time inference before any filtering decision is reached. Our framework, by contrast, requires no indexing and operates at <0.01 ms per file decision. Across 10 real open-source repositories (22,046 files, 5 languages), the proposed SizeFilter at θ=1 MB achieves 79.6% (\pm13.2%) mean token reduction at 0.30 ms overhead: the HybridFilter achieves 89.3% (\pm9.0%) the lowest variance of any filter evaluated. A token-density study across 2,688 files confirms a strong linear correlation (Pearson r=0.997, k=0.250 tokens/byte). A limited-scope evaluation (18 tasks, CodeLlama-7B-Instruct) yields 72% file-level accuracy under filtering versus 25% at baseline; hallucination frequency declines from 61% to 17%. All code and data are released for reproducibility.

</details>


### [221] [SWE-Chain: Benchmarking Coding Agents on Chained Release-Level Package Upgrades](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14415)
*Man Ho Lam,Chaozheng Wang,Hange Liu,Jingyu Xiao,Haau-sing Li,Jen-tse Huang,Terry Yue Zhuo,Michael R. Lyu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SWE-Chain 是一个评估编码智能体在链式包版本升级任务上的基准，包含12条升级链、155个版本转换和1660个升级需求。实验表明，当前最优智能体（Claude-Opus-4.7）仅达到60.8%的解决率，说明智能体在连续版本升级中仍面临挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准大多聚焦于独立问题修复，缺乏对连续软件维护场景（特别是包级别版本升级）的评估。SWE-Chain旨在填补这一空白，模拟真实的链式版本升级场景。

Method: 设计了一个分治合成管线，将发布说明与代码差异对齐，生成基于实际代码变更的升级需求。构建了12条升级链，覆盖9个真实Python包的155个版本转换。

Result: 在9种前沿智能体-模型配置下，平均解决率44.8%，精确率65.4%，F1分数50.2%。Claude-Opus-4.7（Claude Code）表现最佳，解决率60.8%，精确率80.6%，F1分数68.5%。

Conclusion: SWE-Chain具有可行性和区分度，揭示了当前编码智能体在链式包版本升级中仍难以在不破坏现有功能的前提下做出正确升级。

Abstract: Coding agents powered by large language models are increasingly expected to perform realistic software maintenance tasks beyond isolated issue resolution. Existing benchmarks have shifted toward realistic software evolution, but they rarely capture continuous maintenance at the granularity of package releases, where changes are bundled, shipped, and inherited by subsequent versions. We present SWE-Chain, a benchmark for evaluating agents on chained release-level package upgrades, where each transition builds on the agent's prior codebase. To produce upgrade specifications, we design a divide-and-conquer synthesis pipeline that aligns release notes with code diffs for each version transition, ensuring the requirements are grounded in actual code changes, informative to agents, and feasible to implement. SWE-Chain contains 12 upgrade chains across 9 real Python packages, with 155 version transitions and 1,660 grounded upgrade requirements. Across nine frontier agent-model configurations, agents achieve an average of 44.8% resolving, 65.4% precision, and 50.2% F1 under the Build+Fix regime, with Claude-Opus-4.7 (Claude Code) leading at 60.8% resolving, 80.6% precision, and 68.5% F1. These results show that SWE-Chain is both feasible and discriminative, and reveal that current agents still struggle to make correct upgrades across chained package releases without breaking existing functionality.

</details>


### [222] [FuzzAgent: Multi-Agent System for Evolutionary Library Fuzzing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14431)
*Yunlong Lyu,Peng Chen,Fengyi Wu,Junzhe Yu,Kit Long Hon,Hao Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出FuzzAgent，一个多智能体系统，通过迭代进化方式自动化库模糊测试，在20个真实C/C++库上比现有方法覆盖更多分支并发现102个真实漏洞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有库模糊测试自动化程度低，人工成本高，LLM方案缺乏运行时反馈，导致代码覆盖浅、误报多。

Method: FuzzAgent采用多智能体协作架构，将库模糊测试转化为进化过程：多个专用智能体基于运行时证据（覆盖率、崩溃信号）迭代优化测试套件。

Result: 在20个C/C++库上，覆盖179,619个分支，比OSS-Fuzz、PromptFuzz、PromeFuzz、OSS-Fuzz-Gen分别提升45.1%、73.2%、92.1%、191.2%；发现102个真实漏洞，78个已被上游确认修复。

Conclusion: 基于运行时反馈的迭代进化方法能显著提升库模糊测试的自动化程度和效果，实现全流程无人干预。

Abstract: Library fuzzing is essential for hardening the software supply chain, but adopting it at scale remains expensive. Practitioners still spend substantial effort on environment setup, struggle to generate harnesses that respect intricate API constraints, and lack reliable means to tell genuine library bugs from harness-induced crashes. Recent LLM-based systems automate parts of this pipeline, yet they typically operate as one-shot code generators that ignore runtime feedback, which limits both the depth of code they reach and the validity of the bugs they report. We argue that effective library fuzzing is iterative by nature: each campaign exposes new coverage bottlenecks and crashes, and the next campaign should evolve from these signals rather than restart from scratch. Building on this insight, we present FuzzAgent, a multi-agent system that turns library fuzzing into an evolutionary process, in which a team of specialized agents collaborates over the full fuzzing lifecycle and grounds every decision in concrete runtime evidence, so that the harness suite is successively refined toward deeper coverage and higher-fidelity crash analysis across rounds.
  We evaluate FuzzAgent on 20 real-world C/C++ libraries against four state-of-the-art baselines (OSS-Fuzz, OSS-Fuzz-Gen, PromptFuzz, and PromeFuzz). FuzzAgent completes the full fuzzing lifecycle for all 20 libraries without human intervention and reaches 179619 branches, exceeding OSS-Fuzz, PromptFuzz, PromeFuzz, and OSS-Fuzz-Gen by 45.1%, 73.2%, 92.1%, and 191.2%, respectively. FuzzAgent also identifies 102 genuine library bugs, 78 of which have already been acknowledged and fixed by upstream maintainers.

</details>


### [223] [When Retrieval Hurts Code Completion: A Diagnostic Study of Stale Repository Context](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14478)
*Haojun Weng,Qianqian Yang,Hao Fu,Haobin Pan,Xinwei Lv*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文研究了检索增强代码生成中过时的代码片段是否会主动诱导模型生成与当前仓库状态不兼容的代码。通过控制实验发现，过时上下文会显著偏向模型使用旧代码，而非仅仅作为无害噪声。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究检索增强代码生成中，过时的仓库上下文片段是作为无害噪声存在，还是会主动诱导模型生成与当前状态不兼容的代码。

Method: 在5个Python仓库中，对17个生产级辅助函数签名变更样本进行控制诊断实验，比较当前仅、过时仅、无检索、混合检索四种条件下的代码生成表现。

Result: 过时仅检索条件下，Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct在15/17样本和gpt-4.1-mini在13/17样本中生成过时辅助函数引用，分别比当前仅检索增加88.2和76.5个百分点。两种模型有过时触发样本的Jaccard重叠率为75.0%。混合条件显示添加有效当前证据可基本挽救过时失败。

Conclusion: 检索上下文的时效性是代码RAG鲁棒性的独立诊断变量：过时上下文会主动偏向模型使用旧仓库状态，而不仅仅是移除有用证据。

Abstract: Context: Retrieval-augmented code generation relies on cross-file repository context, but retrieved snippets may come from obsolete project states.
  Objectives: We study whether temporally stale repository snippets act as harmless noise or actively induce current-state-incompatible code.
  Methods: We conduct a controlled diagnostic study on a curated 17-sample set of production-helper signature changes from five Python repositories. For each sample, we compare current-only, stale-only, no-retrieval, and mixed current/stale retrieval conditions under prompts that hide commit freshness and expected current signatures.
  Results: Under neutralized prompts, stale-only retrieval induces stale helper references on 15/17 Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct samples and 13/17 gpt-4.1-mini samples, corresponding to 88.2 and 76.5 percentage-point increases over current-only retrieval. No retrieval produces zero stale references but only 1/17 passing completions. The two models share 75.0% Jaccard overlap among stale-triggering samples, and mixed conditions show that adding valid current evidence largely rescues stale-only failures.
  Conclusion: Temporal validity of retrieved repository context is a distinct diagnostic variable for Code RAG robustness: stale context can actively bias models toward obsolete repository state rather than merely removing useful evidence.

</details>


### [224] [Not All RAGs Are Created Equal: A Component-Wise Empirical Study for Software Engineering Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14503)
*Qiang Ke,Yanjie Zhao,Hongjin Leng,Shengming Zhao,Haoyu Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文系统性地拆解了RAG流水线的各个组件，在软件工程任务上评估了21种模型和方法，发现检索器端组件（尤其是检索算法）对系统性能的影响大于生成器模型的选择，其中经典词法检索器BM25表现尤为稳健。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管RAG被越来越多地用于将大语言模型与软件工件结合，但其组件的优化配置缺乏系统性指导，导致从业者不得不进行昂贵且随意的大量实验。

Method: 论文对RAG流水线进行组件级拆解，分别评估了4种查询处理技术、7种检索模型（稀疏/密集/混合）、4种上下文精炼方法和6种生成器，在代码生成、代码摘要和代码修复3个核心软件工程任务上进行实验。

Result: 检索器端组件对最终系统性能的影响通常大于生成器模型的选择；经典词法检索器BM25在不同任务上表现出色且稳健。

Conclusion: 研究提供了数据驱动的实用指南，帮助研究人员和从业者在构建面向软件工程的RAG系统时，明确优化工作的优先级。

Abstract: While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is increasingly adopted to ground Large Language Models (LLMs) in software artifacts, the optimal configuration of its components remains an open question for software engineering (SE) tasks. The lack of systematic guidance forces practitioners into costly, ad-hoc experimentation. This paper presents a comprehensive, component-wise empirical study that dissects the RAG pipeline, evaluating over 21 distinct models and methods. Our study systematically isolates and evaluates 4 query processing techniques, 7 retrieval models spanning sparse, dense, and hybrid paradigms, 4 context refinement methods, and 6 distinct generators. We test these components on a suite of 3 core SE tasks: code generation, summarization, and repair. Our empirical findings reveal a crucial insight: the retriever-side components, particularly the choice of the retrieval algorithm, often exert a more significant influence on final system performance than the selection of the generator model. Strikingly, the classic lexical retriever BM25 demonstrates exceptionally robust performance across diverse tasks. Our analysis provides a practical, data-driven roadmap for researchers and practitioners, offering clear guidance on prioritizing optimization efforts when constructing effective RAG systems for software engineering contexts.

</details>


### [225] [Remember Your Trace: Memory-Guided Long-Horizon Agentic Framework for Consistent and Hierarchical Repository-Level Code Documentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14563)
*Suyoung Bae,Jaehoon Lee,Changkyu Choi,YunSeok Choi,Jee-Hyong Lee*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MemDocAgent是一个长周期智能体框架，通过依赖感知遍历引导和记忆引导交互，在单一集成上下文中为整个代码仓库生成结构化文档，优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仓库级代码文档生成方法独立处理各组件，导致冗余检索、描述冲突且缺乏层次结构，亟需一种能整合全局上下文的高效文档生成方法。

Method: 提出MemDocAgent框架，包含两大组件：(i) 依赖感知遍历引导——预定义遵循依赖和粒度层次的遍历顺序；(ii) 记忆引导智能体交互——智能体通过读、写、验证操作与共享的RepoMemory交互，累积先前工作痕迹。

Result: 在多项评价指标上，MemDocAgent在开源和闭源基线方法中均取得最佳性能，并在实际软件开发工作流中验证了其实用性。

Conclusion: MemDocAgent通过长周期记忆引导的集成上下文文档生成机制，有效解决了现有方法的结构缺失和冗余问题，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Automated code documentation is essential for modern software development, providing the contextual grounding that both human developers and coding agents rely on to navigate large codebases. Existing repository-level approaches process components independently, causing redundant retrieval and conflicting descriptions across documents while producing outputs that lack hierarchical structure. Therefore, we propose MemDocAgent, a long-horizon agentic framework that generates documentation within a single, integrated context spanning the entire repository. It combines two components: (i) Dependency-Aware Traversal Guiding that predetermines a traversal order respecting dependency and granularity hierarchies; (ii) Memory-Guided Agentic Interaction, in which the agent interacts with RepoMemory, a shared memory accumulating prior work traces through read, write, and verify operations. Through an in-depth multi-criteria evaluation, MemDocAgent achieves the best performance over both open and closed-source baselines and demonstrates practical applicability in real software development workflows.

</details>


### [226] [Mining Subscenario Refactoring Opportunities in Behaviour-Driven Software Test Suites: ML Classifiers and LLM-Judge Baselines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14568)
*Ali Hassaan Mughal,Noor Fatima,Muhammad Bilal*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一种自动化方法，通过 paraphrase-robust 聚类和 XGBoost 分类器，从 BDD (行为驱动开发) 测试套件中识别值得重构的重复步骤子序列，并将其映射到三种已知的重构模式。实验表明该方法优于规则基线和 LLM 评判，并在大规模公开 BDD 生态中揭示了广泛的重构机会。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: BDD 测试套件中存在大量重复的步骤子序列，虽然已有三种重构模式（文件内 Background、仓库内可复用的场景调用、跨组织的共享高阶步骤），但缺乏自动化方法来判断哪些重复子序列值得提取以及应使用哪种重构机制。

Method: 在包含 339 个仓库的 Gherkin 语料库上，提取所有连续 L 步窗口 (L∈[2,18])，使用 Sentence-BERT + UMAP + HDBSCAN 进行 paraphrase 鲁棒聚类；三位作者对分层采样的 200 个切片进行标注；训练 XGBoost 分类器预测提取价值和重构机制，与规则基线和两个开源 LLM 进行对比。

Result: 共挖掘出 5,382,249 个切片，缩减为 692,020 个重复模式。三位标注者 Fleiss' kappa = 0.56 (提取价值) 和 0.79 (机制)。XGBoost 分类器 F1 = 0.891 (95% CI [0.852, 0.927])，优于规则基线 (F1=0.836, p=0.017) 和最佳 LLM (F1=0.728, p<1e-4)。75.0%、59.5%、11.7% 的场景分别包含文件内、仓库内、跨组织的重构候选。

Conclusion: 基于 paraphrase 鲁棒的子场景发现方法能够全面普查 BDD 重构机会；实验管道、分类器预测结果、标注数据集和标注规则均以 Apache-2.0 协议开源发布。

Abstract: Context. Behaviour-Driven Development (BDD) software test suites accumulate duplicated step subsequences. Three published refactoring patterns are available (within-file Background, within-repo reusable-scenario invocation, cross-organisational shared higher-level step), but no prior work automates which recurring subsequences are worth extracting or which mechanism applies. Objective. Rank recurring step subsequences ("slices") by refactoring suitability (extraction-worthy), pre-map each to one of the three patterns, and quantify prevalence across the public BDD ecosystem. Method. Every contiguous L-step window (L in [2, 18]) in a 339-repository / 276-upstream-owner Gherkin corpus is keyed by paraphrase-robust cluster identifiers and counted under three scopes. Sentence-BERT (SBERT) / Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection (UMAP) / Hierarchical Density-Based Clustering (HDBSCAN) recovers paraphrase-equivalent slices. Three authors label a stratified 200-slice pool against a written rubric. An eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) extraction-worthy classifier trained under 5-fold cross-validation is compared with a tuned rule baseline and two open-weight Large Language Model (LLM) judges. Results. The miner produces 5,382,249 slices collapsing to 692,020 recurring patterns. Three-author Fleiss' kappa = 0.56 (extraction-worthy) and 0.79 (mechanism). The classifier reaches out-of-fold F1 = 0.891 (95% CI [0.852, 0.927]), outperforming both the rule baseline (F1 = 0.836, p = 0.017) and the better LLM judge (F1 = 0.728, p < 1e-4). 75.0%, 59.5%, and 11.7% of scenarios carry a within-file Background, within-repo reusable-scenario, or cross-organisational shared-step candidate. Conclusion. Paraphrase-robust subscenario discovery yields a corpus-wide census of BDD refactoring opportunities; pipeline, classifier predictions, labelled pool, and rubric are released under Apache-2.0.

</details>


### [227] [In-IDE Toolkit for Developers of AI-Based Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14612)
*Yaroslav Sokolov,Yury Khudyakov,Lenar Sharipov,Andrei Gasparian,Parth Tiwary,Artem Trofimov*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文介绍了JetBrains IDE的AI Toolkit插件，通过将追踪和评估集成到Run/Debug循环中，帮助非ML背景的工程师测试、调试和复现基于LLM的AI功能。混合方法研究揭示了三个核心需求：评估常规化可重复化、执行时暴露追踪、最小化设置和上下文切换。插件实现了运行触发的追踪捕获、分层检查、一键添加到数据集和单元测试式评估。PyCharm首发数据显示了积极的早期信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于LLM和代理工作流的AI功能难以测试、调试和复现，尤其是对于没有机器学习背景的产品软件工程师。现有工具缺乏与IDE原生开发流程的集成，导致开发者难以采用规范化的AI开发实践。

Method: 通过混合方法研究（Mixed Methods Study）识别开发者需求，设计并实现了AI Toolkit插件，包含AI Agents Debugger（运行触发追踪捕获、分层检查、一键添加到数据集）和AI Evaluation（单元测试式评估、可插拔度量）两大组件，在PyCharm中首发并收集采用遥测数据。

Result: PyCharm首发显示：运行时推广转化率高、捕获追踪的用户持续使用、用户流失率低。表明IDE原生可观测性降低了激活能量，帮助开发者养成规范化的AI开发实践。

Conclusion: 将AI可观测性和评估集成到日常IDE工作流中，可以使非ML专家的开发者也能进行现代AI开发，同时保留软件工程的最佳实践。

Abstract: AI-enabled features built on LLMs and agentic workflows are difficult to test, debug, and reproduce, especially for product-focused software engineers without a machine learning background. We present the AI Toolkit plugin for JetBrains IDEs, which brings tracing and evaluation directly into the Run/Debug loop. A mixed methods study with practitioners presents three consistent needs: (1) make evaluation regular and repeatable, (2) expose traces at the moment of execution, and (3) minimize setup and context switching. Guided by these needs, the AI Toolkit introduces an IDE-native workflow: run-triggered trace capture; immediate, hierarchical inspection; one-click "Add to Dataset" from traces; and unit-test-like evaluations with pluggable metrics. The first release in PyCharm shows promising early signals - strong conversion when promoted at Run, sustained usage among those who capture traces, and low churn - suggesting that IDE-native observability lowers activation energy and helps developers adopt disciplined practices. We detail the design and implementation of the AI Agents Debugger and AI Evaluation, report initial adoption telemetry, and outline next steps to broaden framework coverage and scale evaluations. Together, these results indicate that integrating AI observability and evaluation into everyday IDE workflows can make modern AI development accessible to non-ML specialists while preserving software-engineering practices.

</details>


### [228] [Documentation-Guided Agentic Codebase Migration from C to Rust](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14634)
*Minh Le-Anh,Anh Nguyen Hoang,Bach Le,Nghi D. Q. Bui*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: RustPrint是一个文档引导的智能体框架，用于仓库级C到Rust的迁移。它先生成架构感知文档作为蓝图，再由编码智能体规划crate、实现模块、减少unsafe代码并迭代优化，最后通过文档对比和测试套件驱动修复。在8个真实C仓库（11K-84K行代码）上，RustPrint在两个大模型后端下均能编译成功，且特征保留率（93.26%）和交叉评估测试通过率（95.17%）远超基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有C到Rust的迁移工具多在文件或函数级别工作，缺乏对仓库级别架构意图的理解，导致迁移质量不高。

Method: 将源码仓库转换为架构感知文档作为迁移蓝图；编码智能体基于蓝图规划crate、实现模块、检查编译、减少unsafe代码并迭代优化；通过对比Rust输出与源文档的差异作为修复信号；翻译并运行源测试套件以指导针对性修复。

Result: 在8个真实C仓库（11K-84K行代码）上，RustPrint在两个大模型后端下均能编译成功；在open-weight Kimi-K2-Instruct后端下，特征保留率93.26%（基线52.52%），交叉评估测试通过率95.17%（基线79.85%）。

Conclusion: 文档引导的协作机制是可扩展代码库迁移的有效方向。

Abstract: Migrating legacy C repositories to Rust promises stronger memory safety, but existing translators often work at the level of files or functions and miss architectural intent. We present RustPrint, a documentation-guided agentic framework for repository-level C-to-Rust migration. RustPrint first converts the source repository into architecture-aware documentation and treats it as a migration blueprint capturing module structure, data flow, APIs, and design rationale. Coding agents then use this blueprint to plan crates, implement modules, check compilability, reduce unsafe code, and iteratively refine the translated repository. RustPrint next compares documentation from the Rust output against the source documentation and uses mismatches as repair signals. It also translates and runs source test suites so runtime failures can guide targeted fixes. Experiments on eight real-world C repositories ranging from 11K to 84K LoC show that RustPrint compiles every target under both an open-weight (Kimi-K2-Instruct) and a closed-weight (GPT-5.4) backbone, while prior LLM-based translators (Self-Repair, EvoC2Rust) fail repository-wide. With the open-weight Kimi-K2-Instruct backbone, RustPrint exceeds an agentic Claude Code baseline on feature preservation (93.26% vs. 52.52%) and on cross-evaluation test pass rate (95.17% vs. 79.85%). These results suggest that documentation-guided coordination is a useful direction for scalable codebase migration.

</details>


### [229] [Agentic AI in Industry: Adoption Level and Deployment Barriers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14675)
*Spyridon Alvanakis Apostolou,Jan Bosch,Helena Holmström Olsson*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过对12家公司的16位从业者进行定性访谈，揭示了工业界采用Agentic AI的现状：多数公司处于低成熟度水平（Level 1-2），存在“能力-部署验证鸿沟”——公司虽有高级实验能力，但因缺乏可靠的输出验证机制而无法投入生产，核心障碍包括LLM上下文窗口限制、专有语言表现不佳、非确定性与资格标准冲突、数据保密问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Agentic AI系统正进入软件工程工作流，但工业组织如何实际采用这些系统的实证证据仍然匮乏，因此亟需开展定性研究以填补这一认知空白。

Method: 采用定性访谈研究方法，对来自12家不同规模和领域公司的16位从业者进行深度访谈，并运用六层级成熟度框架对公司的Agentic AI采纳状态进行评估。

Result: 7家公司处于Level 1（AI助手），4家处于Level 2（AI补偿器），仅1家达到Level 3（多智能体编排）；大型和安全受监管的组织是较先进的使用者。关键发现是“能力-部署验证鸿沟”：4家公司拥有更高级的实验性AI能力，但缺乏输出验证机制而无法投入生产。

Conclusion: 识别出四大持续性障碍（上下文窗口限制、专有语言性能不足、非确定性与资格标准冲突、数据保密问题），并归纳出信息不对称和资格缺失两个相互依赖的维度，构成了工业级Agentic集成的核心开放问题。

Abstract: Agentic AI systems are entering software engineering workflows, yet empirical evidence on how industrial organizations actually adopt them remains sparse. We present a qualitative interview study with sixteen practitioners across twelve companies of varying size and domain. This study characterizes the current agentic AI adoption state of these companies, employing a six-level maturity framework adapted from established AI-driven organizations. The findings reveal that seven companies operate at Level~1 (AI Assistants), four companies at Level~2 (AI Compensators), and only one in Level~3 (Multi-Agent Orchestration), with large and safety-regulated organizations among the most advanced adopters. The primary finding is a capability-deployment verification gap, four companies demonstrated higher-level experimental AI capabilities but cannot integrate them into production workflows because adequate output verification mechanisms are absent, leaving human-in-the-loop as the only trusted verification mechanism. This gap is shaped by four recurring barriers: context window of LLMs constraints especially when diverse knowledge aggregation is needed, under-performance on proprietary programming languages and protocols, non-determinism incompatible with qualification standards, and data confidentiality concerns. Two interdependent dimensions of this gap emerge from these findings (information asymmetry and qualification absence) framing a core open problem for industrial agentic integration.

</details>


### [230] [Towards In-Depth Root Cause Localization for Microservices with Multi-Agent Recursion-of-Thought](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14866)
*Lingzhe Zhang,Tong Jia,Kangjin Wang,Chiming Duan,Minghua He,Rongqian Wang,Xi Peng,Meiling Wang,Gong Zhang,Renhai Chen,Ying Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 针对微服务系统中现有根因定位方法可解释性差、跨部署迁移能力弱，以及基于LLM的方法存在上下文爆炸和串行推理结构两大局限，本文提出RCLAgent框架，采用多智能体递归并行推理机制，沿追踪图分解诊断过程，将每个span分配给专用智能体，最终综合根级诊断报告和全局证据图得出诊断结果。实验表明该方法在定位准确性和推理效率上均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代微服务系统日益复杂，故障频发，准确的根因定位（RCL）对保障系统可靠性至关重要。现有传统机器学习/深度学习方法存在可解释性差、跨部署迁移性差的问题；而基于大语言模型（LLM）的方法虽有潜力，但仍面临两大根本局限：上下文爆炸（稀释关键证据，降低定位精度）和串行推理结构（阻碍深度因果探索，影响推理效率）。

Method: 提出RCLAgent框架，采用多智能体递归并行推理机制：1）沿追踪图分解诊断过程，将每个span分配给专用智能体（Dedicated Agent）；2）根据图拓扑结构以递归和并行方式组织智能体；3）综合根级诊断报告（Root-Level Diagnosis Report）和全局证据图（Global Evidence Graph）得出最终诊断结果。

Result: 在多个公开基准上的大量实验表明，RCLAgent在定位准确性和推理效率方面均一致优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: RCLAgent通过模拟人类SRE实际根因定位流程，以多智能体递归并行推理的方式有效解决了现有LLM方法的上下文爆炸和串行推理问题，为微服务系统的可靠根因定位提供了更准确、高效的解决方案。

Abstract: As modern microservice systems grow increasingly complex due to dynamic interactions and evolving runtime environments, they experience failures with rising frequency. Ensuring system reliability therefore critically depends on accurate root cause localization (RCL). While numerous traditional machine learning and deep learning approaches have been explored for this task, they often suffer from limited interpretability and poor transferability across deployments. More recently, large language model (LLM)-based methods have been proposed to address these issues. However, existing LLM-based approaches still face two fundamental limitations: context explosion, which dilutes critical evidence and degrades localization accuracy, and serial reasoning structures, which hinder deep causal exploration and impair inference efficiency. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive study of both how human SREs perform root cause localization in practice and why existing LLM-based methods fall short. Motivated by these findings, we introduce RCLAgent, an in-depth root cause localization framework for microservice systems that realizes multi-agent recursion-of-thought with parallel reasoning. RCLAgent decomposes the diagnostic process along the trace graph by assigning each span to a Dedicated Agent and organizing agents recursively and in parallel according to the graph topology, with the final diagnosis obtained by synthesizing the Root-Level Diagnosis Report and the Global Evidence Graph. Extensive experiments on multiple public benchmarks demonstrate that RCLAgent consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both localization accuracy and inference efficiency.

</details>


### [231] [Viverra: Text-to-Code with Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14972)
*Haoze Wu,Rocky Klopfenstein,Keith Farkas,Nina Narodytska*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Viverra是一个能自动为LLM生成的C代码添加形式化验证断言的系统，通过组合式有界模型检查器验证安全性和正确性属性，提升用户对代码的理解效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Text-to-Code生成的代码缺乏正确性保证，人工审查LLM生成的代码耗时费力，可能抵消AI编码工具带来的生产力提升。

Method: 给定自然语言任务描述，Viverra首先提示LLM合成C程序及候选断言（表达安全性和正确性属性），然后通过组合式、尽力而为的方式，使用一组有界模型检查器对这些断言进行验证。

Result: 在18个多样化编程任务上的评估表明Viverra能高效生成带有已验证断言的代码；超过400名参与者的用户研究表明这些断言能提升用户在代码理解任务上的表现。

Conclusion: Viverra通过自动生成并验证形式化断言，有效提升了LLM生成代码的可理解性和可靠性，在不牺牲效率的前提下弥补了Text-to-Code缺乏正确性保证的不足。

Abstract: A fundamental limitation of Text-to-Code is that no guarantee can be obtained about the correctness of the generated code. Therefore, to ensure its correctness, the generated code still has to be reviewed, tested, and maintained by developers. However, parsing through LLM-generated code can be tedious and time-consuming, potentially negating the productivity gains promised by AI-coding tools. To address this challenge, we present Viverra, a system that automatically produces formally verified annotations alongside generated code to aid user's understanding of the generated program. Given a natural-language task description, Viverra prompts an LLM to synthesize a C program together with candidate assertions expressing safety and correctness properties. It then verifies those assertions in a compositional and best-effort manner via a portfolio of bounded model checkers. Evaluation on 18 diverse programming tasks suggests that Viverra can efficiently generate code with verified assertions, and that these assertions improve users' performance on code-comprehension tasks in a user study with more than 400 participants.

</details>


### [232] [Veritas: A Semantically Grounded Agentic Framework for Memory Corruption Vulnerability Detection in Binaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15097)
*Xinran Zheng,Alfredo Pesoli,Marco Valleri,Suman Jana,Lorenzo Cavallaro*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Veritas是一个语义驱动的二进制内存损坏漏洞检测框架，结合静态切片、双视角LLM检测器和多智能体验证器，在真实二进制漏洞上达到90%召回率且无假阳性，并发现了Apple的CVE漏洞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 剥离二进制文件中恢复对象语义、进行过程间传播以及从低层次有损表示中识别可行触发条件非常困难，现有方法缺乏内存相关语义和运行时可行性证据的支撑。

Method: 1) 基于RetDec提升LLVM IR的静态切片器重构值流关系；2) 双视角LLM检测器结合反编译C代码和选择性LLVM IR进行逐步推理；3) 多智能体验证器通过调试器、断点检查和内存检测来确认或拒绝候选漏洞。

Result: 在真实世界二进制漏洞基准上达到90%召回率。623个检测器候选经过穷举验证无假阳性，额外审计发现两个确认假阳性。发现并确认了一个Apple未知漏洞（已分配CVE）。

Conclusion: 语义基础性可以作为实际二进制漏洞检测的操作性设计原则。

Abstract: Detecting memory corruption vulnerabilities in stripped binaries requires recovering object semantics, interprocedural propagation, and feasible triggers from low-level, lossy representations. Recent LLM-based approaches improve code understanding, but reliable detection still requires grounding in memory-relevant semantics and runtime feasibility evidence. We present Veritas, a semantically grounded framework for binary memory corruption vulnerability detection. Veritas combines a static slicer over RetDec-lifted LLVM IR, a dual-view LLM detector that reasons step by step over grounded flows using decompiled C and selective LLVM IR, and a multi-agent validator that checks hypotheses against debugger-visible artifacts and runtime evidence. The slicer reconstructs value-flow relations from LLVM-IR facts, including def-use, calls, returns, globals, and pointer operations, and emits compact witness-backed flow objects. The detector uses these artifacts to reason about control flow, bounds, and object correspondence without rediscovering whole-binary propagation. The validator confirms or rejects candidates through guided debugging, breakpoint inspection, and memory-checking oracles. We implement Veritas as a modular pipeline and evaluate it on a curated benchmark of real-world binary vulnerability cases. Veritas achieves 90\% recall. For false-positive assessment, we exhaustively validate and manually verify 623 detector candidates and audit additional candidates from larger cases. The exhaustive subset produces no false positives, while the additional audit identifies two confirmed false positives. In a real-world application, Veritas discovered a previously unknown Apple vulnerability that was confirmed and assigned a CVE. These results support semantic grounding as an operational design principle for practical binary vulnerability detection.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [233] [Common-agency Games for Multi-Objective Test-Time Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13875)
*Baiting Chen,Tong Zhu,Rui Yu,Xiaowu Dai*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: CAGE是一个免训练、基于博弈论的多目标测试时对齐框架，通过将对齐目标建模为战略委托人，在token级别分配激励，使LLM在推理时实现多目标均衡，无需重新训练即可灵活权衡不同偏好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM与人类偏好对齐方法多为单目标优化，无法处理不同用户和评估标准对模型输出提出的异构且相互冲突的多目标需求。

Method: 基于共同代理博弈（Common-Agency Games）框架，将多目标对齐建模为多个战略委托人（对齐目标）向共享代理人（LLM）分配token级激励，并通过EPEC（均衡约束均衡问题）算法计算博弈均衡策略。

Result: CAGE在推理时实现灵活细粒度的多目标权衡，持续优于现有测试时对齐方法，且支持弱到强的泛化，无需重新训练。

Conclusion: CAGE为多目标对齐提供了一种训练免费、理论保证、实践高效的解决方案，特别适用于资源受限场景。

Abstract: Aligning large language models (LLMs) with human preferences is inherently multi-objective: different users and evaluation criteria impose heterogeneous and often conflicting requirements on model outputs. We propose CAGE (Common-Agency Games for Alignment), a training-free, game-theoretic framework for multi-objective test-time alignment. CAGE models alignment objectives as strategic principals that allocate token-level incentives to a shared LLM, inducing an equilibrium policy that captures the joint effect of competing objectives. We develop an efficient algorithm based on equilibrium problems with equilibrium constraints (EPEC) to compute this equilibrium, and establish theoretical guarantees including existence and uniqueness of the equilibrium policy, convergence and stability of the algorithm, and no-regret learning dynamics. Empirically, CAGE enables flexible and fine-grained trade-offs across objectives at inference time, consistently outperforming existing test-time alignment methods while requiring no retraining. It further supports weak-to-strong generalization, making multi-objective alignment practical in resource-constrained settings.

</details>


### [234] [TERMS-Bench: Diagnosing LLM Negotiation Agents Beyond Deal Rate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13909)
*Erica Zhang,Fangzhao Zhang,Aneesh Pappu,Batu El,Jose Blanchet,Susan Athey,Jiashuo Liu,James Zou*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 提出了 Terms-Bench，一个基于贝叶斯博弈的框架，通过将对手的私有状态暴露给评估者而非智能体，使环境本身成为验证器，从而将谈判评估从聚合排名转变为可操作诊断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 LLM 谈判评估依赖 LLM-vs-LLM 交互或聚合结果（如成交率），无法揭示模型失败的具体原因。谈判没有内在验证器，难以像数学或代码那样评估。

Method: 设计 Terms-Bench 框架，在双边价格谈判中设定对手的潜在类型、策略和收益结构，对手的私有状态对智能体隐藏但对评估者可见，将对手从黑箱对手变为诊断工具。

Result: 评估了来自主要供应商的 13 个前沿 LLM 智能体，发现前沿模型在成交率上饱和，但在剩余抽取、线索使用、信念校准和合规性上存在显著差异，揭示了各模型特有的谈判瓶颈。

Conclusion: Terms-Bench 将谈判评估从聚合排名转变为可操作的诊断分析，能够回答模型在何处失败、为何失败以及需要强化什么。

Abstract: Negotiation is a central mechanism of economic exchange, shaping markets, procurement, labor agreements, and resource allocation. It is also a canonical testbed for agentic language models, requiring multi-turn interaction under hidden preferences, strategic communication, and binding constraints. These properties make negotiation hard to evaluate: unlike math or code, it has no intrinsic verifier. Existing LLM negotiation evaluations rely on LLM-vs.-LLM interaction or aggregate outcomes such as deal rate, leaving failures opaque. We introduce Terms-Bench, short for Testbed for Economic Reasoning in Multi-turn Strategy, a Bayesian-game framework that makes the environment itself the verifier by specifying the counterpart's latent type, policy, and payoff structure. We instantiate it in bilateral price negotiation, where the counterpart's private state and simulator policy are hidden from the agent but observable to the evaluator. This turns the counterpart from a black-box opponent into a diagnostic instrument, enabling agent-attributable failure analysis and oracle-reference optimality gaps. Evaluating 13 LLM agents spanning frontier systems from major providers, Terms-Bench turns negotiation evaluation from aggregate ranking into actionable diagnosis: where agents fail, why they fail, and what to strengthen. Empirically, frontier models saturate deal rate yet diverge in surplus extraction, cue use, belief calibration, and compliance, revealing agent-specific bargaining bottlenecks masked by prior benchmarks.

</details>


### [235] [Watermarking Game-Playing Agents in Perfect-Information Extensive-Form Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14283)
*Juho Kim,Fei Fang,Tuomas Sandholm*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文首次将LLM的水印技术扩展到完美信息博弈（如国际象棋）中，证明可以通过统计检测在博弈策略中嵌入水印，且对策略质量影响极小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 防止游戏平台中AI工具的未授权使用（如在线国际象棋作弊），类似LLM中检测模型滥用的需求。

Method: 将KGW水印方法适配到完美信息扩展式博弈中，通过统计检验检测水印，并理论分析了质量与可检测性之间的权衡。

Result: 实验证明对多种国际象棋引擎添加水印后策略质量影响可忽略，且仅需少量对局即可检测出水印。

Conclusion: 博弈策略水印是可行的，在保证质量的前提下具备良好的可检测性，为游戏AI滥用检测提供了新思路。

Abstract: Watermarking techniques for large language models (LLMs), which encode hidden information in the output so its source can be verified, have gained significant attention in recent days, thanks to their potential capability to detect accidental or deliberate misuse. Similar challenges involving model misuse also exist in the context of game-playing, such as when detecting the unauthorized use of AI tools in gaming platforms (e.g., cheating in online chess). In this paper, we initiate the study of how game-playing strategies can be watermarked. We show how the KGW watermark for LLMs can be adapted to watermark game-playing agents in perfect-information extensive-form games. The watermark can then be detected using a statistical test. We show that the degradation in the quality of the watermarked strategy profile, quantified by the expected utility, can be bounded, but there is a tradeoff between detectability and quality. In our experiments, we bootstrap the watermarking framework to various chess engines and demonstrate that a) the impact of the watermark on the quality of the strategy is negligible and b) the watermark can be detected with just a handful of games.

</details>


### [236] [Agreement, Diversity, and Polarization Indices for Approval Elections](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14983)
*Piotr Faliszewski,Jitka Mertlová,Krzysztof Sornat,Stanisław Szufa,Tomasz Wąs*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文针对批准投票选举，提出了一系列衡量选民一致性、多样性和两极分化的指数，并确保其相对于饱和度的归一化，通过理论分析和实际数据验证了这些指数的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的选举指数缺乏对饱和度（即平均选民批准的候选人比例）的归一化处理，导致不同规模选举间的比较存在偏差。本文旨在设计能消除这一偏差的指数，以更公平地衡量选举中的一致性、多样性和极化程度。

Method: 定义了批准选举中衡量一致性、多样性和极化程度的多个指数，并引入饱和度归一化条件；通过理论推导分析指数性质；将指数应用于Pabulib、Preflib等真实选举数据集，构建选举地图并比较不同选举的异同。

Result: 提出了一系列满足归一化条件的指数；成功绘制了批准选举的新地图；在多个真实数据集上展示了不同选举在一致性、多样性和极化方面的差异与相似性。

Conclusion: 本文提出的归一化指数能有效消除饱和度干扰，为批准选举的比较分析提供了更可靠的工具，有助于理解不同选举场景下的选民行为模式。

Abstract: An index is a function that given an election outputs a value between 0 and 1, indicating the extent to which this election has a particular feature. We seek indices that capture agreement, diversity, and polarization among voters in approval elections, and that are normalized with respect to saturation. By the latter we mean that if two elections differ by the fraction of candidates approved by an average voter, but otherwise are of similar nature, then they should have similar index values. We propose several indices, analyze their properties, and use them to (a) derive a new map of approval elections, and (b) show similarities and differences between various real-life elections from Pabulib, Preflib and other sources.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [237] [Thinking Ahead: Prospection-Guided Retrieval of Memory with Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14177)
*Harshita Chopra,Krishna Kant Chintalapudi,Suman Nath,Ryen W. White,Chirag Shah*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出Prospection-Guided Retrieval (PGR)，一种受人类"预见"能力启发的检索方法。PGR通过树状思维(ToT)或线性链扩展用户查询，生成合理的未来步骤作为检索探针，并利用检索结果迭代改进后续预见，从而发现与用户历史相关但在嵌入空间中距离遥远的记忆。在MemoryQuest基准及185个用户画像的1,625个查询上，PGR-ToT的召回率比最强基线提升近3倍，LLM评判和人工标注均偏好PGR生成回复（89-98%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG和GraphRAG系统依赖嵌入相似性检索或固定图遍历，属于"回顾式"方法，容易遗漏与用户需求相关但在语义空间中距离查询较远的事实。人类具有"预见"能力——用想象未来作为回忆线索——启发作者将这种能力引入检索系统，以改善长程对话个性化中的事实检索。

Method: PGR将检索与记忆存储解耦。给定用户查询，先通过Tree-of-Thought（ToT）或线性链扩展查询为若干合理的未来步骤，将这些步骤作为检索探针（而非仅用原始查询）。检索到的事实用于个性化下一轮预见，使PGR能在模拟扎根于用户历史后，发现原本不相关的额外记忆。

Result: 在MemoryQuest基准（1,625个查询，185个用户画像，3个公开数据集）上，PGR-ToT召回率较最强基线提升近3倍。成对LLM评判中，PGR生成回复在89-98%查询中被偏好，盲法人工标注结果一致。

Conclusion: 明确的预见机制在长程检索和回复质量上相比仅依赖相似性的基线方法带来大幅提升，证明将人类认知中的预见能力引入检索系统是有效的。

Abstract: Long-horizon personalization requires dialogue assistants to retrieve user-specific facts from extended interaction histories. In practice, many relevant facts often have low semanticsimilarity to the query under dense retrieval. Standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and GraphRAG systems are still largely retrospective: they rely on embedding similarity to the query or on fixed graph traversals, so they often miss facts that matter for the user's needs but lie far from the query in embedding space. Inspired by prospection, the human ability to use imagined futures as cues for recall, we introduce Prospection-Guided Retrieval (PGR), which decouples retrieval from how memories are stored. Given a user query, PGR first expands the goal into a short Tree-of-Thought (ToT) or linear chain of plausible next steps, and uses these steps as retrieval probes rather than relying on the original query alone. The facts retrieved by these probes are then used to personalize the next round of prospection, enabling PGR to uncover additional memories that become relevant only after the simulation is grounded in the user's history. We also introduce MemoryQuest, a challenging multi-session benchmark in which each query is annotated with 3--5 dated reference facts subject to a low query-reference similarity constraint. Across 1,625 queries spanning 185 user profiles from 3 publicly available datasets, PGR-TOT substantially improves retrieval, including nearly 3x recall on MemoryQuest over the strongest baseline. In pairwise LLM-as-judge comparisons against baselines, PGR-generated responses are preferred on 89--98% of queries, with blinded human annotations on held-out subsets showing the same trend. Overall, the results demonstrate that explicit prospection yields large gains in long-horizon retrieval and response quality relative to similarity-only baselines.

</details>


### [238] [Towards Self-Evolving Agentic Literature Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14306)
*Yuwen Du,Tian Jin,Jing Kang,Xianghe Pang,Jingyi Chai,Tingjia Miao,Fenyi Liu,WenHao Wang,Sikai Yao,Yuzhi Zhang,Siheng Chen*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: PaSaMaster是一个自进化的智能体文献检索系统，通过迭代式意图分析、检索和排序，生成带证据支撑的论文相关性排序。它使用前沿LLM仅做意图理解，轻量模型负责大规模检索，在38个学科上F1分数提升15.6倍，比GPT-5.2性能高30%但成本仅1%，且实现零来源幻觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统关键词检索无法捕捉复杂研究意图，而前沿LLM虽然能处理复杂意图但成本高且存在高达37.79%的幻觉率。如何在保证来源真实性的同时深入理解学术检索意图，是当前文献检索面临的双重挑战。

Method: PaSaMaster将文献检索从一次性查询-文档匹配转变为随时间演化的搜索过程，包含三个核心设计：1) 利用排序证据揭示差距、细化意图并指导后续搜索；2) 将检索视为意图-论文相关性排序而非生成，防止幻觉来源；3) 分离规划与检索，仅用前沿LLM理解意图，大规模检索和相关性评分委托给定制语料库和轻量模型。

Result: 在38个科学学科上评估，F1分数比传统关键词检索提升15.6倍；生成式LLM幻觉率高达37.79%；PaSaMaster在计算成本仅为GPT-5.2的1%的情况下，性能高出30.0%，且实现零来源幻觉。

Conclusion: PaSaMaster通过自进化智能体范式，在文献检索任务中同时实现了高准确性、高可靠性（零幻觉）和高成本效益，显著优于传统关键词检索和生成式LLM方法。

Abstract: As large language models reshape scientific research, literature retrieval faces a twofold challenge: ensuring source authenticity while maintaining a deep comprehension of academic search intents. While reliable, traditional keyword-centric search fails to capture complex research intents. Frontier LLMs can handle complex research intents, but their high cost and tendency to hallucinate remain key limitations. Here we introduce PaSaMaster, a self-evolving agentic literature retrieval system that produces relevance-scored paper rankings with evidence-grounded recommendations through iterative intent analysis, retrieval, and ranking. It is built on three key designs. First, it transforms literature retrieval from a one shot query--document matching problem into a search process that evolves over time, using ranked evidence to reveal gaps, refine intents, and guide follow-up searches. Second, it prevents hallucinated sources by treating retrieval as intent--paper relevance ranking rather than generation. Finally, PaSaMaster improves cost efficiency by separating planning from retrieval: a frontier LLM is used only for intent understanding, while large scale retrieval and relevance scoring are delegated to customized corpora and lightweight models. Evaluated on the PaSaMaster Benchmark across 38 scientific disciplines, our system exposes the severe inaccuracy and incompleteness of traditional keyword retrieval (improving F1-score by 15.6X) and the unreliability of generative LLMs (which exhibit hallucination rates up to 37.79%). Remarkably, PaSaMaster outperforms GPT-5.2 by 30.0% at a mere 1% of the computational cost while ensuring zero source hallucination: https://github.com/sjtu-sai-agents/PaSaMaster

</details>


### [239] [Efficient Generative Retrieval for E-commerce Search with Semantic Cluster IDs and Expert-Guided RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14434)
*Jianbo Zhu,Xing Fang,Jing Wang,Mingmin Jin,Bokang Wang,Guangxin Song,Zhenyu Xie,Junjie Bai*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出CQ-SID和EG-GRPO框架，将生成式检索作为工业电商搜索中召回阶段的补充而非端到端替代，通过类别感知对比学习、残差量化VAE和强化学习对齐排序目标，在淘宝搜索日志和线上A/B测试中显著提升了点击率、GMV等指标，生产环境中贡献了超过50%的曝光和70%以上的购买。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式检索虽能统一多阶段检索流程，但在工业电商场景中面临海量动态商品目录、严格延迟要求以及检索与下游排序目标对齐的挑战，尚无有效的实际部署方案。

Method: 1) CQ-SID：利用类别感知和查询-物品对比学习结合残差量化VAE，将物品编码为层次化语义聚类标识符，降低束搜索复杂度；2) EG-GRPO：基于专家指导的组相对策略优化，通过注入真实样本稳定训练，使生成式召回与下游排序目标对齐。

Result: 离线实验：语义点击命中率提升26.76%，个性化点击命中率提升11.11%，束搜索规模减半。线上A/B测试：GMV提升1.15%，UCTCVR提升0.40%，生产环境中该通道贡献曝光50.25%、点击58.96%、购买72.63%。

Conclusion: 生成式检索作为召回阶段的补充方案在工业级电商系统中可行且有效，能够显著提升业务指标并在生产环境中担当重要角色。

Abstract: Generative retrieval offers a promising alternative by unifying the fragmented multi-stage retrieval process into a single end-to-end model. However, its practical adoption in industrial e-commerce search remains challenging, given the massive and dynamic product catalogs, strict latency requirements, and the need to align retrieval with downstream ranking goals. In this work, we propose a retrieval framework tailored for real-world recall scenarios, positioning generative retrieval as a recall-stage supplement rather than an end-to-end replacement. Our method, CQ-SID (Category-and-Query constrained Semantic ID), employs category-aware and query-item contrastive learning along with Residual Quantized VAEs to encode items into hierarchical semantic cluster identifiers, significantly reducing beam search complexity. Additionally, we develop EG-GRPO (Expert-Guided Group Relative Policy Optimization), a reinforcement learning approach that aligns generative recall with downstream ranking under sparse rewards by injecting ground-truth samples to stabilize training. Offline experiments on TmallAPP search logs show that CQ-SID achieves up to 26.76% and 11.11% relative gains in semantic and personalized click hitrate over RQ-VAE baselines, while halving beam search size. EG-GRPO further improves multi-objective performance. Online A/B tests confirm gains in GMV (+1.15%) and UCTCVR (+0.40%). The generative recall channel now contributes substantially in production, accounting for over 50.25% of exposures, 58.96% of clicks, and 72.63% of purchases, demonstrating a viable path for deploying generative retrieval in real-world e-commerce systems.

</details>


### [240] [Stop Overthinking: Unlocking Efficient Listwise Reranking with Minimal Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14450)
*Danyang Liu,Kan Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出长度正则化自蒸馏框架，通过帕累托最优筛选高效推理路径，在保持重排序效果的同时将推理token消耗降低34%-37%，缓解LLM重排序器中的"过度思考"问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理增强型LLM重排序器虽性能优异，但生成数千推理token导致计算成本过高；作者发现"过度思考"现象——延长推理带来的收益递减，亟需一种兼顾效率与效果的方法。

Method: 提出Length-Regularized Self-Distillation框架：1) 从教师模型(Rank-K)采样多样化推理轨迹；2) 应用帕累托最优滤波器筛选高排名性能+低token消耗的轨迹；3) 在精简高质量推理解释上微调学生模型，使其内化高效推理模式。

Result: 在TREC Deep Learning和NeuCLIR基准上，该方法在保持教师模型效果的同时，在不同检索设置下将推理token消耗降低34%-37%。

Conclusion: 提出了一种实用解决方案，使得推理增强型重排序器能够在延迟敏感型应用中高效部署，通过自蒸馏实现推理效率与排序质量的平衡。

Abstract: Listwise reranking utilizing Large Language Models (LLMs) has achieved state-of-the-art retrieval effectiveness. Recently, reasoning-enhanced models have further pushed these boundaries by employing Chain-of-Thought (CoT) to perform deep comparative analysis of candidate documents. However, this performance gain comes at a prohibitive computational cost, as models often generate thousands of reasoning tokens before producing a final ranking. In this work, we investigate the relationship between reasoning length and ranking quality, revealing an overthinking phenomenon where extended reasoning yields diminishing returns. To address this, we propose a Length-Regularized Self-Distillation framework. We synthesize a dataset by sampling diverse reasoning traces from a teacher model (Rank-K) and applying a Pareto-inspired filter to select traces that achieve high ranking performance with minimal token usage. By fine-tuning on these concise, high-quality rationales, the student model learns to internalize efficient reasoning patterns, effectively pruning redundant deliberation. Experiments on TREC Deep Learning and NeuCLIR benchmarks demonstrate that our method maintains the teacher's effectiveness while reducing inference token consumption by 34%-37% across different retrieval settings, offering a practical solution for deploying reasoning-enhanced rerankers in latency-sensitive applications.

</details>


### [241] [Asymmetric Generative Recommendation via Multi-Expert Projection and Multi-Faceted Hierarchical Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14512)
*Bin Huang,Xin Wang,Junwei Pan,Yongqi Zhou,Yifeng Zhou,Zhixiang Feng,Shudong Huang,Haijie Gu,Wenwu Zhu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出AsymRec，通过非对称连续-离散框架解决生成式推荐中双阶段信息瓶颈问题，平均提升15.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GenRec模型使用对称的离散Semantic ID表示，存在输入阶段（量化损失+流行度偏差）和输出阶段（不精确离散目标）的双重信息瓶颈，限制了推荐性能。

Method: 提出AsymRec非对称框架：(1) 多专家语义投影(MSP)将连续嵌入映射到Transformer隐空间，保留语义丰富性；(2) 多面层次量化(MHQ)通过多视角多层次量化构建高容量结构化离散目标，防止维度坍塌。

Result: 在广泛实验中，AsymRec平均超过最先进的生成式推荐方法15.8%。

Conclusion: 输入输出解耦的非对称设计能有效缓解GenRec的双阶段信息瓶颈，显著提升推荐效果。

Abstract: Generative Recommendation (GenRec) models reformulate recommendation as a sequence generation task, representing items as discrete Semantic IDs used symmetrically as both inputs and prediction targets. We identify a critical dual-stage information bottleneck in this design: (1) the Input Bottleneck, where lossy quantization degrades fine-grained semantics, while popularity bias skews the learned representations toward frequent items, and (2) the Output Bottleneck, where imprecise discrete targets limit supervision quality. To address these issues, we propose AsymRec, an asymmetric continuous-discrete framework that decouples input and output representations. Specifically, Multi-expert Semantic Projection (MSP) maps continuous embeddings into the Transformer's hidden space via expert-specialized projections, preserving semantic richness and improving generalization to infrequent items. Multi-faceted Hierarchical Quantization (MHQ) constructs high-capacity, structured discrete targets through multi-view and multi-level quantization with semantic regularization, preventing dimensional collapse while retaining fine-grained distinctions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AsymRec consistently outperforms state-of-the-art generative recommenders by an average of 15.8 %. The code will be released.

</details>


### [242] [Discrimination Is Generation: Unifying Ranking and Retrieval from a Tokenizer Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14853)
*Shuli Wang,Junwei Yin,Changhao Li,Senjie Kou,Chi Wang,Yinqiu Huang,Yinhua Zhu,Haitao Wang,Xingxing Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出 DIG 方法，将分词器嵌入判别式排序模型中端到端训练，使生成式检索与判别式排序统一，显著提升检索与排序性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式推荐中，语义ID的分词器与检索目标独立训练，导致个性化信号与SID构建脱节，生成式检索性能始终落后于判别式排序。

Method: 提出 DIG 框架，基于"排序和检索本质是同一问题在不同粒度上的解"的洞察，将分词器嵌入判别式排序模型中联合训练。核心包括：物品固有静态特征编码为SID，用户-物品交叉特征隐式驱动码本边界趋近推荐决策边界，以及 MLP_u2t 蒸馏模块在推理时逼近 token 级用户-物品交互。

Result: 在三个公开基准和两个工业数据集上，DIG 同时提升了排序、检索以及统一检索-排序的质量。

Conclusion: DIG 有效弥合了生成式检索与判别式排序之间的差距，证明"判别即生成"的理念可行，为生成式推荐提供了新的范式。

Abstract: Semantic IDs (SIDs) define the generation space of generative recommendation and directly determine its personalization ceiling. However, existing tokenizers are trained independently with retrieval objectives, leaving personalization signals fully decoupled from the SID construction process -- a fundamental gap that causes generative retrieval to persistently lag behind discriminative ranking. In this paper, we rethink the essence of SIDs: \emph{ranking seeks argmax in item space while retrieval seeks argmax in token space; both are the same problem solved at different granularities.} Based on this insight, we propose \DIG (\textbf{D}iscrimination \textbf{I}s \textbf{G}eneration), which embeds the tokenizer inside a discriminative ranking model for end-to-end training -- the ranker naturally becomes a retrieval model, yielding two models from a single training run. \DIG is organized around a \emph{feature assignment taxonomy}: item-intrinsic static features are encoded into SIDs, user-item cross features (u2i) implicitly drive codebook boundaries toward recommendation decision boundaries during training, and an MLP$_\mathrm{u2t}$ distillation module approximates u2i at the token level for inference. Experiments on three public benchmarks and two industrial datasets demonstrate that \DIG simultaneously improves ranking, retrieval, and unified retrieval-ranking quality.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [243] [A Hormone-inspired Emotion Layer for Transformer language models (HELT)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13858)
*Eslam Reda,Sara El-Metwally*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出HormoneT5，一种受生物启发的 transformer 语言模型架构，通过模拟人体内分泌系统的"荷尔蒙情绪块"（Hormone Emotion Block）来赋予大语言模型处理连续、多维情感状态的能力，在情感适当性和共情质量上显著优于基线T5模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型缺乏处理情感上下文的机制，当前NLP情感建模主要依赖离散情感分类或简单情感分析，无法捕捉人类情感状态的连续性和多维性。

Method: 提出HormoneT5架构，核心是"荷尔蒙情绪块"：通过六个专门化注意力头计算连续荷尔蒙值（每个头有正交初始化的可学习查询、温度缩放注意力机制和深度输出投影），将荷尔蒙值转换为情感嵌入调制编码器隐藏状态。使用多目标训练框架（序列到序列损失、带边际惩罚的荷尔蒙预测损失、多样性正则化防止注意力坍缩）。

Result: 在自建情感标签数据集上，六种荷尔蒙在0.15容差阈值下准确率均超过85%，荷尔蒙区分度超过0.85；人类评估显示HormoneT5生成响应在情感适当性和共情质量上显著优于基线T5（p < 0.01）。

Conclusion: 该工作为生物启发的情感计算和具有情感智能的对话代理开辟了新方向。

Abstract: Large Language Models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in generating contextually relevant and grammatically correct text. However, they fundamentally lack the ability to process and respond to emotional context in a manner analogous to human emotional cognition. Current approaches to emotion modeling in NLP systems rely primarily on discrete emotion classification or simplistic sentiment analysis, which fail to capture the continuous, multi-dimensional nature of human emotional states. In this paper, we introduce HormoneT5, a novel architecture that augments transformer language models with a biologically-inspired Hormone Emotion Block that simulates the human endocrine system's role in emotional processing. Our approach computes six continuous hormone-like values through specialized per-hormone attention heads, each with orthogonally initialized learnable queries, temperature-scaled attention mechanisms, and deep output projections. These hormone values are then transformed into an emotional embedding that modulates the encoder hidden states, enabling emotionally-appropriate response generation. We propose a multi-objective training framework combining sequence-to-sequence loss, hormone prediction loss with margin penalties, and diversity regularization to prevent attention collapse. Experimental results on our curated emotion-labeled dataset demonstrate that HormoneT5 achieves 85%+ per-hormone accuracy within a 0.15 tolerance threshold, with hormone differentiation ranges exceeding 0.85 across all six hormones between contrasting emotional tones. Human evaluation studies show significant preference (p < 0.01) for HormoneT5-generated responses in terms of emotional appropriateness and empathetic quality compared to baseline T5 outputs. Our work opens new directions for biologically-grounded affective computing and emotionally intelligent conversational agents.

</details>


### [244] [BiSpikCLM: A Spiking Language Model integrating Softmax-Free Spiking Attention and Spike-Aware Alignment Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13859)
*Sihang Guo,Chenlin Zhou,Jiaqi Wang,Kehai Chen,Qingyan Meng,Zhengyu Ma*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出BiSpikCLM，首个全二值化、无矩阵乘法的脉冲因果语言模型，通过软max-free脉冲注意力和尖峰感知对齐蒸馏，在极低计算成本下达到与ANN相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有脉冲大语言模型仍存在密集浮点矩阵乘法/非线性运算，以及训练困难的问题，亟需一种更高效、易训练的全二值化脉冲语言模型。

Method: 1) Softmax-Free Spiking Attention (SFSA)：消除softmax和浮点运算；2) Spike-Aware Alignment Distillation (SpAD)：在嵌入、注意力图、中间特征和输出logits四个层面进行ANN-SNN知识蒸馏。

Result: 仅需5.6%的训练token即达到与ANN可比较的性能；计算成本仅为ANN的4.16%-5.87%。

Conclusion: 证明了全二值脉冲驱动LLM的可行性和有效性，蒸馏方法为类脑脉冲NLP提供了有前景的路径。

Abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) offer promising energy-efficient alternatives to large language models (LLMs) due to their event-driven nature and ultra-low power consumption. However, to preserve capacity, most existing spiking LLMs still incur intensive floating-point matrix multiplication (MatMul) and nonlinearities, or training difficulties arising from the complex spatiotemporal dynamics. To address these challenges, we propose BiSpikCLM, the first fully binary spiking MatMul-free causal language model. BiSpikCLM introduces Softmax-Free Spiking Attention (SFSA), eliminating softmax and floating-point operations in autoregressive language modeling. For efficient training, we introduce Spike-Aware Alignment Distillation (SpAD), which aligns ANN teacher and SNN student across embeddings, attention maps, intermediate features, and output logits. SpAD framework allows BiSpikCLM to reach comparable performance to ANN counterparts using substantially fewer training tokens (e.g., only 5.6% of the tokens for the 1.3B model). As a result, BiSpikCLM achieves competitive performance at only 4.16% - 5.87% of the computational cost on natural language generation tasks. Our results highlight the feasibility and effectiveness of fully binary spike-driven LLMs and establish the distillation as a promising pathway for brain-inspired spiking NLP.

</details>


### [245] [Neuromorphic Graph Anomaly Detection via Adaptive STDP and Spiking Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13863)
*Abdul Joseph Fofanah,Lian Wen,David Chen,Tsungcheng Yao,Kwabena Sarpong*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出ASTDP-GAD，一种基于脉冲神经网络和STDP学习的动态图异常检测框架，在保持生物合理性和能效的同时，在9个数据集上实现了优异的检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动态图异常检测方法在能效、时间精度和适应性方面存在不足，亟需一种兼具生物合理性、低能耗和高精度的方法。

Method: 将脉冲图神经网络与STDP学习结合，提出了六项关键创新：时间脉冲图编码、LIF图注意力机制、事件驱动超图记忆、脉冲率对比池化、自适应STDP层以及多尺度时间卷积与多因子异常融合。

Result: 在9个动态和静态图数据集上取得优异的异常检测准确率；多因子融合方差降低高达5倍；理论分析证明了各模块的收敛性和有效性。

Conclusion: ASTDP-GAD在动态网络异常检测中实现了精度、生物合理性和能效的平衡，适合神经形态芯片部署，为能效驱动的图异常检测提供了新范式。

Abstract: Anomaly detection in dynamic networks is critical for applications from cybersecurity to industrial monitoring, yet existing methods face challenges in energy efficiency, temporal precision, and adaptability. This paper introduces ASTDP-GAD, a novel Adaptive Spiking Temporal Dynamics Plasticity framework for Graph Anomaly Detection that integrates spiking graph neural networks with STDP learning for energy-efficient neuromorphic detection in dynamic networks. Our framework unifies spiking neural computation, STDP learning, and graph-based anomaly detection through the following key innovations: temporal spike graph encoding with adaptive Leaky Integrate-and-Fire (LIF) dynamics; LIF-based graph attention with lateral inhibition; event-driven hypergraph memory with STDP-inspired prototype updates; spike rate contrast pooling based on spiking irregularity; adaptive STDP layers capturing causal temporal relationships; and multi-scale temporal convolution with multi-factor anomaly fusion. Theoretical analysis provides rigorous guarantees: spike encoding preserves input information with resolution scaling linearly in simulation steps and hidden dimension; LIFGAT approximates any continuous attention function; hypergraph memory converges to optimal prototypes; contrast pooling achieves provable anomaly selection bounds; STDP learning converges stably; and multi-factor fusion produces calibrated scores with up to $5\times$ variance reduction. Extensive experiments on nine datasets on both dynamic and static graphs demonstrate superior anomaly detection accuracy while maintaining biological plausibility and energy efficiency for neuromorphic deployment.

</details>


### [246] [Elastic Spiking Transformers for Efficient Gesture Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13869)
*Alberto Ancilotto,Gianluca Amprimo,Stefano Di Carlo,Elisabetta Farella*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出弹性脉冲 Transformer（Elastic Spiking Transformer），一种可在推理时动态调整网络宽度和注意力头数的运行时自适应架构，无需重新训练，从而适配不同硬件预算并降低脉冲发放率和突触操作能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有脉冲神经网络（SNN）架构固定参数规模和计算图，无法灵活适配如 Loihi、SpiNNaker 等神经形态硬件的片上资源限制，导致在精度与可行性之间需要取舍。

Method: 受 Matryoshka 表示学习启发，在特征提取器、脉冲自注意力和前馈块中嵌入嵌套弹性，通过粒度感知的权重共享，使单一通用模型可在推理时动态裁剪网络宽度和注意力头数。

Result: 在 CIFAR10/100、CIFAR10-DVS 和 EHWGesture 数据集上，一个 Elastic Spiking Transformer 可覆盖广泛的复杂度-精度权衡曲线，匹配或超越独立训练的基线模型，并支持资源受限边缘设备上的实时手势识别。

Conclusion: 该弹性设计为 SNN 提供了两大优势：适配不同硬件内存预算，以及通过减少活跃神经元降低脉冲发放率和突触操作能耗，这在标准人工神经网络中无法直接实现。

Abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), particularly Spiking Transformers, offer energy-efficient processing of event-based sensor data for healthcare applications. Yet current architectures are rigid: they are trained and deployed as static networks with fixed parameter counts and computational graphs. This limits deployment on neuromorphic hardware such as Loihi and SpiNNaker, where on-chip constraints often require smaller models that trade accuracy for feasibility. We introduce the Elastic Spiking Transformer, a runtime-adaptive architecture that brings elasticity into the spiking paradigm. Inspired by Matryoshka-style representation learning, it embeds nested elasticity in the Feature Extractor, Spiking Self-Attention, and Feed-Forward blocks. Through granularity-aware weight sharing, a single universal model can dynamically slice network width and attention heads at inference time without retraining. This design provides two key advantages for SNNs. First, it allows the model to adjust its parameter footprint to different hardware memory budgets. Second, reducing active neurons also lowers spike firing rates, yielding proportional reductions in synaptic operations, an energy benefit not directly available in standard artificial neural networks. We evaluate the approach on CIFAR10/100, CIFAR10-DVS, and the EHWGesture clinical gesture understanding dataset. Results show that one Elastic Spiking Transformer spans a broad range of complexity-accuracy trade-offs, matching or surpassing independently trained baselines while supporting adaptive, real-time gesture recognition on resource-constrained edge devices.

</details>


### [247] [Indian Wedding System Optimization (IWSO): A Novel Socially Inspired Metaheuristic with Operational Design and Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13871)
*Deepika Saxena,Kishu Gupta,Jitendra Kumar,Jatinder Kumar,Sakshi Patni,Vinaytosh Mishra,Niharika Singh,Ashutosh Kumar Singh*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出一种受印度婚礼社会文化启发的新型元启发式优化算法——印度婚礼系统优化（IWSO），通过媒人引导策略和自适应淘汰机制，在基准测试中展现出优于GA、PSO、DE等传统算法的收敛速度、解质量和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统优化算法在处理高维和多模态复杂问题时存在收敛速度慢、易陷入局部最优等局限，作者受印度婚礼中家庭、候选人和媒人协作的社交动态启发，希望设计一种无需外部参数、能平衡探索与利用的新型元启发式算法。

Method: IWSO包含两个核心创新：(1) 媒人引导策略——精英解指导弱势候选者的进化方向，无需外部参数即可增强收敛；(2) 自适应淘汰与重新初始化机制——替换表现不佳的个体以维持种群多样性、防止早熟收敛。算法采用加权多目标适应度函数，并推导了时间与空间复杂度。

Result: 在高维和多模态基准测试函数上的大量实验表明，IWSO在收敛速度、解质量和鲁棒性方面均优于GA、PSO、DE、CS等现有优化方法。

Conclusion: IWSO作为一种受社会文化启发的新型元启发式算法，通过巧妙的引导与多样性维护机制，在复杂优化问题上展现了显著优势，为群体智能优化领域提供了新思路。

Abstract: This paper presents a novel population-based metaheuristic, Indian Wedding System Optimization (IWSO), inspired by the socio-cultural dynamics of traditional Indian weddings. IWSO models the matchmaking process driven by collaboration among families, candidates, and matchmakers as a guided, selective search framework for solving complex optimization problems. The algorithm introduces two key innovations: (i) a matchmaker-guided influence strategy, where elite solutions direct the evolution of weaker candidates, enhancing convergence without external parameters; and (ii) an adaptive elimination and reinitialization mechanism that maintains diversity and prevents premature convergence by replacing underperforming individuals. IWSO employs a weighted multi-objective fitness function and analytically derived time and space complexity, benchmarked against existing optimization approaches such as Genetic Algorithm (GA), Partical Swarm Optimization (PSO), Differential Evolution (DE), Cuckoo Search (CS), etc. Extensive experiments on benchmark high-dimensional and multimodal test functions demonstrate superior performance of IWSO in terms of convergence speed, solution quality, and robustness.

</details>


### [248] [S-AI-Recursive: A Bio-Inspired and Temporal Sparse AI Architecture for Iterative, Introspective, and Energy-Frugal Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13872)
*Said Slaoui*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出S-AI-Recursive，一种受生物启发的稀疏人工智能架构，通过两种拮抗激素（Clarifine和Confusionin）驱动的闭环迭代推理机制，替代传统前馈结构，以较少参数实现竞争性推理性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统AI架构依赖堆叠更多参数（宽度）来提升性能，但缺乏生物认知系统中递归、闭环的推理机制。本文旨在通过迭代认知深度替代架构宽度，实现参数高效的推理。

Method: 基于激素-概率统一理论，定义递归推理循环（RRC）为动力系统；引入Clarifine（收敛信号）和Confusionin（不确定性检测）两种拮抗激素调控状态迭代；建立完整数学框架，包括Lyapunov稳定性证明、熵收缩定理、有限时间终止准则、Euler-Maruyama离散化、主-对偶智能体选择等。

Result: 在SAI-UT+测试集上，S-AI-Recursive以不到1000万参数，在抽象和符号推理任务上达到了有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: 验证了"时间节俭"原则：迭代认知深度可替代架构宽度，为构建参数高效、可解释的AI系统提供了新范式。

Abstract: This article introduces S-AI-Recursive, a bio-inspired Sparse Artificial Intelligence architecture in which reasoning is operationalized as a hormonal closed-loop iteration rather than a single feed-forward pass. Building upon the S-AI foundational framework [1], the hormonal-probabilistic unification doctrine [2], and the formal mathematical methodology established in S-AI-IoT [3], the present work formalizes the Recursive Reasoning Cycle (RRC) as a dynamical system governed by two novel hormones: Clarifine, a convergence signal, and Confusionin, an uncertainty detector, whose antagonistic regulation drives iterative state refinement toward a stable cognitive equilibrium. The complete mathematical framework is developed, including recursive state dynamics, Lyapunov stability proof, entropic contraction theorem, hormonal stopping criterion with finite-time termination guarantee, Euler-Maruyama discretization with projection, primal-dual agent selection under iteration budget, and recursive engram memory with warm-start acceleration. Experimental validation on the SAI-UT+ testbench demonstrates that S-AI-Recursive achieves competitive reasoning performance on abstract and symbolic benchmarks with fewer than ten million parameters, confirming the central principle of temporal parsimony: iterative cognitive depth substitutes for architectural width.

</details>


### [249] [GEAR: Genetic AutoResearch for Agentic Code Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13874)
*Ahmadreza Jeddi,Minh Ngoc Le,Hakki C. Karaimer,Konstantinos G. Derpanis,Babak Taati*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: GEAR是一种基于种群搜索的自主科研方法，通过维护多个研究状态、使用变异和交叉探索新想法，替代了传统的单一路径搜索策略。实验表明，在相同计算预算下，GEAR的三个版本均优于基线方法，并能持续改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主研究智能体采用单一路径搜索策略（反复修改一个程序，只有改进时才保留），容易丢弃有用的部分想法、替代性方向和失败实验中的洞见，导致陷入局部最优。

Method: GEAR（Genetic AutoResearch）采用种群搜索：维护一组强候选解，基于产出、新颖性和覆盖度选择父代，通过变异和交叉探索新想法。每个研究状态存储代码变更、反思和性能数据。论文测试了三种版本：提示控制、固定程序化搜索控制器、以及可进化的控制器。

Result: 在相同计算预算下，三个版本的GEAR均优于AutoResearch基线。基线倾向于陷入局部最优，而GEAR在长时间运行中持续找到改进。

Conclusion: 自主研究智能体在维护多个有前景的方向并能自适应调整搜索策略时，其有效性会显著提升。

Abstract: Autonomous research agents can already run machine learning experiments without human supervision, but many rely on a narrow search strategy: they repeatedly modify one program and keep changes only when they improve the current best result. This can cause them to discard useful partial ideas, alternative promising directions, and insights from failed or incomplete experiments. GEAR, or Genetic AutoResearch, replaces this single-path search with a population-based search over multiple research states. It keeps a set of strong candidate solutions, selects parents based on productivity, novelty, and coverage, and explores new ideas through mutation and crossover. Each research state stores its code changes, reflections, and performance data, allowing future decisions to build on past discoveries. The paper studies three versions of GEAR: one controlled through prompting, one using a fixed programmatic search controller, and one where the controller itself can evolve during the run. Under the same compute budget and environment, all three versions outperform the AutoResearch baseline. More importantly, while the baseline tends to settle into one local optimum, GEAR continues finding improvements over longer runs. Overall, the results suggest that autonomous research agents become more effective when they maintain multiple promising directions and can adapt their search strategy over time.

</details>


### [250] [ARES-LSHADE: Autoresearch-Enhanced LSHADE with Memetic Polish for the GNBG Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13877)
*Abdullah Naeem,Md Wasi Ul kabir,Manish Bhatt,Ayon Dey,Anav Katwal,Md Tamjidul Hoque*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出ARES-LSHADE，一种基于差分进化的模因算法，在GECCO 2026的GNBG基准测试中取得510/744胜，达到18/24函数机器精度。算法包含两个创新：自适应CMA-ES融合的侦察突变算子和多启动L-BFGS-B精化阶段。文章还讨论了LLM驱动研究循环中黑箱规则与算法能力的张力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在LLM设计进化算法的竞赛背景下，进一步提升LSHADE框架在GNBG广义数值基准生成器上的优化性能，同时探索LLM自主研究循环能否发现超越人工设计的算法组件。

Method: 基于LLM-LSHADE 2025获胜者，加入两个新组件：(a) 侦察增强突变算子，通过约30次LLM驱动实验自适应融合CMA-ES；(b) 多启动L-BFGS-B精化阶段，严格遵守黑箱设定。

Result: 在官方31次/函数评估下，ARES-LSHADE获得744场中510场胜利（差距<1e-8），18/24函数达到机器精度。剩余6个函数呈现GNBG组合结构特有的平台特征。

Conclusion: LLM驱动研究循环在仅操作符编辑面和适应度观测面下会收敛到特征平台；扩大观测空间（包含组合元数据）虽能解决所有24个函数但违反黑箱规则。未来LLM驱动优化算法研究需注意此张力。

Abstract: We present ARES-LSHADE, a memetic differential-evolution variant submitted to the GECCO 2026 competition on LLM-designed evolutionary algorithms for the Generalized Numerical Benchmark Generator (GNBG). The algorithm builds on the LLM-LSHADE 2025 winner, contributing two new components: (a) a scout-augmented mutation operator with adaptive CMA-ES integration, produced by an autonomous research loop across approximately thirty LLM-driven design experiments, and (b) a multi-start L-BFGS-B polish phase that respects strict blackbox treatment of the benchmark. On the official 31-run-per-function evaluation with the competition-specified function-evaluation budgets, ARES-LSHADE obtains 510 of 744 wins (per-function gap below 1e-8), reaching machine precision on 18 of 24 functions. The remaining six functions exhibit characteristic plateau signatures consistent with GNBG's compositional structure, and were independently identified by the autoresearch loop as the hardest of the suite. Beyond the result itself, this report documents two methodological observations: (i) an LLM-driven research loop with operator-only edit surface and fitness-only observation space converges to a characteristic plateau on this benchmark; (ii) when we initially widened the observation space to include the benchmark's compositional metadata, the resulting algorithm trivially solved all 24 functions but violated the competition's blackbox rule, which we identified before submission. We discuss this tension between LLM capability and benchmark integrity as a design consideration for future LLM-driven optimization-algorithm research. Code and reproducibility artifacts are available at https://github.com/anaeem1/ARES-LSHADE.

</details>


### [251] [Breaking Global Self-Attention Bottlenecks in Transformer-based Spiking Neural Networks with Local Structure-Aware Self-Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13887)
*Lingdong Li,Hangming Zhang,Qiang Yu*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出LSFormer，一种新型Transformer脉冲神经网络，通过引入Spiking Response Pooling (SPooling)和局部结构感知脉冲自注意力机制(LS-SSA)，解决了现有Transformer-based SNN中最大池化特征丢失和全局自注意力计算冗余的问题，在Tiny-ImageNet和N-CALTECH101上分别提升4.3%和8.6%的分类准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Transformer-based SNN存在两个根本局限：1）使用最大池化降维，仅保留最强响应，无法全面保留代表性区域特征；2）全局自注意力涉及所有全局特征交互，导致计算冗余和二次复杂度，违背SNN的稀疏节能特性。

Method: 提出LSFormer框架，包含两个核心组件：1）Spiking Response Pooling (SPooling)——替代最大池化，更全面地保留区域特征；2）局部结构感知脉冲自注意力(LS-SSA)——采用局部扩张窗口机制，同时捕捉局部细节和长距离依赖，降低计算复杂度。

Result: 在挑战性静态数据集Tiny-ImageNet上比SOTA提升4.3%，在神经形态数据集N-CALTECH101上提升8.6%，达到最先进分类性能。

Conclusion: LSFormer展示了将节能脉冲模型部署于大规模视觉应用的潜力，有效平衡了性能与计算效率。

Abstract: Transformer-based Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) integrate SNNs with global self-attention and have demonstrated impressive performance. However, existing Transformer-based SNNs suffer from two fundamental limitations. First, they typically employ max pooling layers to reduce the size of feature maps, but the max pooling captures only the strongest response and fails to comprehensively preserve representative regional features. Second, the global self-attention involves all global feature interactions, resulting in computational redundancy and quadratic computational complexity, thus conflicting with the sparse and energy-efficient characteristics of SNNs. To address these challenges, we develop Local Structure-Aware Spiking Transformer (LSFormer), a novel Transformer-based Spiking Neural Network that incorporates Spiking Response Pooling (SPooling) and Local Structure-Aware Spiking Self-Attention (LS-SSA). For the first time, our LSFormer leverages a local dilated window mechanism to capture both local details and long-range dependencies. Experimental results demonstrate that our LSFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to existing advanced Transformer-based SNNs. Notably, on the more challenging static dataset Tiny-ImageNet and neuromorphic dataset N-CALTECH101, LSFormer substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by 4.3\% and 8.6\% in top-1 classification accuracy, respectively. These results highlight the potential of LSFormer to advance energy-efficient spiking models toward practical deployment in large-scale vision applications.

</details>


### [252] [Dual-axis attribution of zebrafish tectal microcircuits for energy-efficient and robust neurocomputing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13924)
*Ningping Li,Hao Zhang,Yi Zhou*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本研究通过斑马鱼视顶盖微电路重建与功能归因分析，发现ns_TIN亚回路负责节能信息门控，superficial_TIN亚回路维持系统鲁棒性，并将这两种功能迁移至ResNet18，在CIFAR-10上验证了各自的计算优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物神经回路包含支持不同计算功能的特化子结构，但许多类脑神经网络借鉴生物机制时未能识别其回路层面的起源，缺乏从亚电路到人工架构的系统性归因与迁移方法。

Method: 1. 重建斑马鱼视网膜顶盖有向微电路图，通过动态仿真验证信号传播；2. 构建LIF脉冲神经网络作为非线性扰动测试平台，选择性消融预定义亚回路，用能量敏感度指数和鲁棒性敏感度指数评估；3. 将归因功能迁移至ResNet18，在CIFAR-10上测试计算预算缩减和高斯噪声场景下的性能。

Result: ns_TIN亚回路具有低脉冲足迹但对预测误差有显著影响，表现为脉冲高效内部信息门控；superficial_TIN亚回路产生最高的鲁棒性敏感度，具有维持系统稳定的反馈样功能。迁移至ResNet18后，ns_TIN模块在低计算量下保持性能，superficial_TIN模块提升输入噪声下的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 本研究提供了从生物回路组织到类脑神经架构设计的亚回路级功能归因与迁移路径，揭示了特定生物微电路的计算功能可被定向提取并应用于人工神经网络。

Abstract: Biological neural circuits contain specialized substructures that support distinct computational functions, yet many bio-inspired neural networks borrow biological motifs without identifying their circuit-level origins. In this study, we investigate whether zebrafish tectal microcircuits can be attributed along two computational axes: energy-efficient information processing and robustness-preserving stabilization. We reconstruct a directed zebrafish-inspired retinotectal microcircuit graph and verify retinotectal signal propagation through dynamic simulation.
