A leaky integrate-and-fire spiking neural network is then used as a nonlinear perturbation testbed, where predefined subcircuits are selectively ablated and evaluated using the Energy Sensitivity Index and the Robustness Sensitivity Index.The results reveal a functional dissociation between two tectal subcircuits.The \textit{ns\_TIN} subcircuit shows a low spike footprint but a measurable influence on prediction error, suggesting a role as a spike-efficient internal information gate.In contrast, the \textit{superficial\_TIN} subcircuit produces the highest robustness sensitivity, suggesting a feedback-like role in maintaining system-level stability.We further transfer these attributed functions into ResNet18-based artificial neural networks and evaluate them on CIFAR-10 under inference-budget reduction and Gaussian noise corruption. The \textit{ns\_TIN}-inspired module improves performance preservation under reduced computation, whereas the \textit{superficial\_TIN}-inspired module improves robustness under input noise. These findings provide a subcircuit-level route for linking biological circuit organization with bio-inspired neural architecture design.

</details>


### [253] [Darwin Family: MRI-Trust-Weighted Evolutionary Merging for Training-Free Scaling of Language-Model Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14386)
*Taebong Kim,Youngsik Hong,Minsik Kim,Sunyoung Choi,Jaewon Jang,Junghoon Shin,Minseo Kim*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出Darwin Family框架，通过免训练、梯度自由的权重空间重组实现大型语言模型的进化式融合。核心创新包括：(i) 14维自适应合并基因组；(ii) MRI-Trust Fusion自适应诊断层重要性信号；(iii) 跨架构映射器。旗舰模型Darwin-27B-Opus在GPQA Diamond上达86.9%，排名第6，超越其完全训练的基础模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索是否可以在不进行额外训练的情况下，通过重组现有检查点中已编码的潜在能力，来提升前沿级别的推理性能，从而替代成本高昂的后训练流程。

Method: 提出三种关键技术：(1) 14维自适应合并基因组，实现细粒度组件和块级重组；(2) MRI-Trust Fusion，通过可学习的信任参数自适应平衡诊断层重要性信号与进化搜索；(3) Architecture Mapper，支持异构模型家族间的跨架构杂交。

Result: Darwin-27B-Opus在GPQA Diamond上达到86.9%，在1252个评估模型中排名第6，超越其完全训练的基础模型。在4B到35B参数规模上，Darwin模型均持续优于其父代模型，并支持递归多代进化。

Conclusion: 诊断引导的进化式融合是成本高昂的后训练流程的一种实用且可复现的替代方案，能够在不进行梯度训练的情况下提升推理型语言模型的性能。

Abstract: We present Darwin Family, a framework for training-free evolutionary merging of large language models via gradient-free weight-space recombination. We ask whether frontier-level reasoning performance can be improved without additional training, by reorganizing latent capabilities already encoded in existing checkpoints. Darwin introduces three key ideas: (i) a 14-dimensional adaptive merge genome enabling fine-grained component- and block-level recombination; (ii) MRI-Trust Fusion, which adaptively balances diagnostic layer-importance signals with evolutionary search through a learnable trust parameter; and (iii) an Architecture Mapper that enables cross-architecture breeding between heterogeneous model families. Empirically, the flagship Darwin-27B-Opus achieves 86.9% on GPQA Diamond, ranking #6 among 1,252 evaluated models, and outperforming its fully trained foundation model without any gradient-based training. Across scales from 4B to 35B parameters, Darwin models consistently improve over their parents, support recursive multi-generation evolution, and enable a training-free evolutionary merge that combines Transformer- and Mamba-based components. Together, the Darwin Family demonstrates that diagnostic-guided evolutionary merging is a practical and reproducible alternative to costly post-training pipelines for reasoning-centric language models.

</details>


### [254] [First Mathematical Runtime Analyses of Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithms for Multi-Valued Decision Variables](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14836)
*Mingfeng Li,Zheng Cheng,Weijie Zheng,Benjamin Doerr*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文首次对多值决策变量（r>2）下的多目标进化算法进行运行时间分析，证明经典SEMO算法在r值OneMinMax基准上的期望运行时间上界为O(n²r² log n)，下界为Ω(n²r(r + log n))，并通过严格接受改进解的变体算法达到了匹配的界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有理论工作几乎全部集中在二元决策空间上的MOEA分析，但实际应用中大量问题涉及多值决策变量（r>2），这一理论空白亟需填补。

Method: 选取经典SEMO算法（单位强度局部变异），将其应用于r值化OneMinMax基准函数，推导Pareto前沿覆盖所需期望函数评估次数的上下界；同时考虑仅接受严格改进解的算法变体。

Result: 标准SEMO算法上界O(n²r² log n)，下界Ω(n²r(r + log n))；严格改进变体上界O(n²r(r + log n))，与下界匹配。

Conclusion: 经典MOEA处理多值决策变量时不会遇到显著额外困难，但针对更复杂的种群动态算法仍需更先进的理论工具才能获得紧界。

Abstract: Problems defined on binary decision spaces have been intensively studied in the theory of multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs). In contrast, no mathematical runtime analyses exist so far for MOEAs dealing with decision variables that take a finite number $r > 2$ of values, despite the prevalence of such problems in practice. In this work, we begin to fill this research gap. We analyze how the classic SEMO algorithm with unit-strength local mutation computes the Pareto front of an $r$-valued counterpart of the classic \oneminmax benchmark. For the expected number of function evaluations until the Pareto front is covered by the population of this MOEA, we prove an upper bound of $O(n^2 r^2 \log n)$ and a near-tight lower bound of $Ω(n^2 r (r + \log n))$. We can close the small remaining gap between these two bounds by considering a variant of the algorithm that accepts only strictly better solutions; for this variant, we show an upper bound of $O(n^2 r (r + \log n))$, matching our lower bound (which also holds for this variant). Our results suggest that classic MOEAs encounter no significant additional difficulties when dealing with multi-valued decision variables. However, significantly more advanced tools may be required to obtain tight bounds for algorithms with more complex population dynamics.

</details>


### [255] [NeuroTrain: Surveying Local Learning Rules for Spiking Neural Networks with an Open Benchmarking Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15058)
*Alessio Caviglia,Filippo Marostica,Roberta Bardini,Alessandro Savino,Stefano Di Carlo*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文对脉冲神经网络（SNN）训练算法进行了系统分类，涵盖替代梯度反向传播、局部/三因子学习规则、生物启发可塑性机制、ANN-to-SNN转换及非标准优化策略，并开源了基于snnTorch的统一框架NeuroTrain以支持可复现研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SNN训练算法快速增长但缺乏统一、细粒度的分类体系，现有文献零散且概念关系不清晰，阻碍了领域系统性理解与比较。

Method: 提出细粒度分类法，按计算原理、学习信号和局部性属性对五大类算法（替代梯度、三因子学习、生物可塑性、ANN转换、非标准优化）进行系统分析，并构建统一模块化开源框架NeuroTrain实现标准化基准测试。

Result: 建立了全面的SNN训练算法分类体系，识别了各类算法的共性模式，并发布了可复现的基准测试框架。

Conclusion: 该工作整合了碎片化文献，提供了可复用的基准框架，揭示了开放挑战，并指出了可扩展高效SNN训练的未来方向。

Abstract: The rapid expansion of spiking neural networks (SNNs) has led to a proliferation of training algorithms that differ widely in biological inspiration, computational structure, and hardware suitability. Despite this progress, the field lacks a unified, fine-grained taxonomy that systematically organizes these approaches and clarifies their conceptual relationships. This survey provides a comprehensive taxonomy of SNN training algorithms, spanning surrogate-gradient backpropagation, local and three-factor learning rules, biologically inspired plasticity mechanisms, ANN-to-SNN conversion pipelines, and non-standard optimization strategies. We analyze each class in terms of its computational principles, learning signals, and locality properties. To support reproducible research, we release NeuroTrain, an open-source snnTorch-based framework that implements a representative set of these algorithms within a unified, modular, and extendable framework, enabling consistent benchmarking across datasets, architectures, and training regimes. By consolidating fragmented literature and providing a reusable benchmarking framework, this survey identifies common patterns, highlights open challenges, and outlines promising directions for future work on scalable, efficient SNN training.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [256] [Vision-Based Runtime Monitoring under Varying Specifications using Semantic Latent Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13923)
*Bardh Hoxha,Oliver Schön,Hideki Okamoto,Lars Lindemann,Georgios Fainekos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究在部分可观测性下，基于视觉观测对过去时间信号时态逻辑（ptSTL）进行认证运行时监控。提出可重用监控器，通过语义基向量和滚动预测两种方法，在无需逐公式重训练的情况下提供有限样本保证，实验表明两者在不同时间维度上各有优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有监控方法在视觉观测下要么缺乏可重用的形式化保证，要么需要为每个公式单独训练，效率低下。本文旨在设计一种一旦训练和校准后即可认证目标片段中任意公式、无需逐公式重训练的可重用监控接口。

Method: 提出两种方法：1) 语义基监控器，预测时态原子鲁棒性分数向量，通过确定性解码器评估任意公式，单次保形校准即可认证整个片段；2) 滚动预测监控器，仅预测当前谓词值并在线重建时间历史。理论上证明了语义基向量在单调1-Lipschitz可重用接口类中的最优性。

Result: 在行人交叉路口基准上，滚动监控器在短时间域上边界更紧，语义基监控器在长时间域上紧4倍。在真实Waymo驾驶数据上，两种监控器均经验证满足保形覆盖保证。

Conclusion: 语义基监控器在长时间域上更优，滚动监控器在短时间域上更优，两者互补。方法有效解决了视觉观测下可重用认证监控问题，无需联合界即可认证整个公式片段。

Abstract: We study certified runtime monitoring of past-time signal temporal logic (ptSTL) from visual observations under partial observability. The monitor must infer safety-relevant quantities from images and provide finite-sample guarantees, while being \emph{reusable}: once trained and calibrated, it should certify any formula in a target fragment without per-formula retraining. For fragments induced by a finite dictionary of temporal atoms, we prove that the \emph{semantic basis}, the vector of atom robustness scores, is the minimum prediction target within the class of monotone, 1-Lipschitz reusable interfaces: any formula is evaluated by a deterministic decoder derived from the parse tree, and a single conformal calibration pass certifies the entire fragment with no union bound. We also introduce a \emph{rolling prediction monitor} that predicts only current predicate values and reconstructs temporal history online; this is easier to learn but grows conservative at long horizons. On a pedestrian-crossroad benchmark, rolling achieves tighter certified bounds at short horizons while the semantic-basis monitor is up to 4-times tighter at long horizons. We validate the presented monitors on real-world Waymo driving data, where both monitors satisfy the conformal coverage guarantee empirically.

</details>


### [257] [Mechanistic Interpretability of EEG Foundation Models via Sparse Autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13930)
*William Lehn-Schiøler,Magnus Ruud Kjær,Rahul Thapa,Magnus Guldberg Pedersen,Anton Storgaard Mosquera,Nick Williams,Radu Gatej,Tue Lehn-Schiøler,Sándor Beniczky,Sadasivan Puthusserypady,James Zou,Lars Kai Hansen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对三个EEG基础模型的Transformer架构应用TopK稀疏自编码器，提取稀疏特征字典，并通过临床分类法（异常、年龄、性别、药物）评估特征的单义性和纠缠性，提出目标vs离靶探针区域指标量化概念引导选择性，揭示" wrecking-ball"干预和临床纠缠等问题，最后用频谱解码器将潜在操作映射为生理可解释的频率特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EEG基础模型在临床任务中表现优异，但其内部计算过程不透明，阻碍了临床信任。论文旨在通过可解释性方法揭示这些模型的内部表征机制。

Method: 对三种架构各异的EEG Transformer（SleepFM、REVE、LaBraM）应用TopK稀疏自编码器提取特征字典；基于临床分类法（异常、年龄、性别、药物）进行单义性和纠缠性评估；提出"目标vs离靶探针区域"指标量化概念引导选择性；使用频谱解码器将干预映射到振幅谱。

Result: 单超参数程序可跨架构迁移；发现三种操作模式（选择性可引导、编码但纠缠、未编码）；识别出" wrecking-ball"干预和临床纠缠（如年龄-病理混淆）等代表性失败模式；成功将潜在操作转化为生理可解释的频率信号（如病理性慢波抑制、α波恢复）。

Conclusion: 该框架有效暴露了EEG基础模型中的表征缺陷，为提升模型透明度和临床可信度提供了可解释性工具，特别是通过频谱解码实现了从潜在操作到生理信号的闭环解释。

Abstract: EEG foundation models achieve state-of-the-art clinical performance, yet the internal computations driving their predictions remain opaque: a barrier to clinical trust. We apply TopK Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) across three architecturally distinct EEG transformers: SleepFM, REVE, and LaBraM to extract sparse feature dictionaries from their embeddings. By grounding these features in a clinical taxonomy (abnormality, age, sex, and medication), we benchmark monosemanticity and entanglement across architectures. A single hyperparameter procedure, driven by an intrinsic dictionary health audit, transfers robustly across all three architectures. Via concept steering, we introduce a "target vs. off-target" probe area metric to quantify steering selectivity and reveal three operational regimes: selectively steerable, encoded but entangled, and non-encoded. This framework exposes critical representational failures: "wrecking-ball" interventions that collapse global model performance, and clinical entanglements, such as age-pathology confounding, where it is impossible to suppress one concept without corrupting the other. Finally, a spectral decoder maps these interventions back to the amplitude spectrum, translating latent manipulations into physiologically interpretable frequency signatures, such as pathological slow-wave suppression and $α$-band restoration.

</details>


### [258] [Rethinking Molecular OOD Generalization via Target-Aware Source Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13932)
*Zhuohao Lin,Kun Li,Jiameng Chen,Jiajun Yu,Duanhua Cao,Yizhen Zheng,Wenbin Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SCOPE-BENCH基准测试（基于物理化学描述符空间的簇级划分来评估分子性质极端分布外泛化能力）和POMA框架（通过检索-组合-适应的多源域自适应管线，利用强化学习选择最优源域子集并进行双尺度域自适应），实验表明现有3D分子模型在SCOPE-BENCH上预测误差激增最高达8.0倍，而POMA可将平均绝对误差降低最高11.2%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有支架划分方案无法阻断微观语义重叠，导致模型通过捷径学习高估真实外推能力；传统域自适应方法在极端结构偏移下进行盲目对齐会注入拓扑噪声并引发负迁移。亟需更严格的评估标准和更鲁棒的迁移方法。

Method: 1) SCOPE-BENCH：在显式物理化学描述符空间中进行簇级划分，构建极端OOD评估基准。2) POMA：采用检索-组合-适应管线——先识别与无标签目标结构接近的有标签源支架作为代理目标；再通过强化学习策略从指数级候选池中自适应选择最优源子集；最后在宏观拓扑和微观药效团两个尺度进行域自适应。

Result: SOTA 3D分子模型在SCOPE-BENCH上预测误差激增高达8.0倍（平均5.9倍）；POMA在多种骨干架构上平均绝对误差降低最高达11.2%，平均相对改进6.2%。

Conclusion: 现有分子性质预测模型的OOD泛化能力被严重高估，SCOPE-BENCH提供了更严格的评估标准；POMA通过检索-强化学习-双尺度适应的组合策略有效缓解了极端结构偏移下的负迁移问题。

Abstract: Robust prediction of molecular properties under extreme out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios is a pivotal bottleneck in AI-driven drug discovery. Current scaffold-splitting protocols fail to obstruct microscopic semantic overlap, predisposing models to shortcut learning and overestimating their true extrapolation capability; meanwhile, conventional domain adaptation paradigms suffer under extreme structural shifts, as blindly aligning heterogeneous source libraries injects topological noise and triggers negative transfer. To address these two challenges, scaffold-cluster out-of-distribution performance evaluation benchmark (SCOPE-BENCH), a benchmark built on cluster-level partitioning in an explicit physicochemical descriptor space, is proposed alongside policy optimization for multi-source adaptation (POMA), a framework that formulates knowledge transfer as a retrieve-compose-adapt pipeline: labeled source scaffolds structurally close to the unlabeled target are first identified as proxy targets; a reinforcement learning policy then adaptively selects the optimal source subset from an exponentially large candidate pool; and dual-scale domain adaptation is finally performed at macroscopic topological and microscopic pharmacophore scales. Evaluations show that prediction errors of state-of-the-art 3D molecular models surge by up to 8.0x on SCOPE-BENCH with a mean of 5.9x, while POMA achieves up to an 11.2% reduction in mean absolute error with an average relative improvement of 6.2% across diverse backbone architectures. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Molecular-OOD-Code-73F6.

</details>


### [259] [Data-Augmented Game Starts for Accelerating Self-Play Exploration in Imperfect Information Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14379)
*JB Lanier,Nathan Monette,Pierre Baldi,Roy Fox*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出数据增强游戏起点(DAGS)策略，通过从离线人类演示数据中采样中间状态来初始化强化学习数据收集，以加速大规模不完美信息二人零和博弈中的在线探索，在固定计算预算下实现更低的可利用度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模不完美信息竞争游戏（如星际争霸、刀塔、反恐精英）因稀疏奖励和长视界探索困难，寻找近似均衡在计算上仍不可行。

Method: 提出多智能体起始状态采样策略(DAGS)，基于离线人类演示数据提供高层策略覆盖的假设，从中间状态初始化RL数据收集以促进战略相关子游戏的探索，并采用多任务观察标志来缓解均衡偏差。

Result: 在合成数据集和可解析的长视界控制变体（Kuhn扑克、Goofspiel等）实验中，DAGS使正则化策略梯度方法在更挑战的探索游戏中实现更低的可利用度。

Conclusion: 不完美信息游戏中增强起始状态分布可能导致有偏均衡，多任务观察标志可提供直接的缓解方案；同时发布了增加探索挑战和状态数量的新基准环境。

Abstract: Finding approximate equilibria for large-scale imperfect-information competitive games such as StarCraft, Dota, and CounterStrike remains computationally infeasible due to sparse rewards and challenging exploration over long horizons. In this paper, we propose a multi-agent starting-state sampling strategy designed to substantially accelerate online exploration in regularized policy-gradient game methods for two-player zero-sum (2p0s) games. Motivated by an assumption that offline demonstrations from skilled humans can provide good coverage of high-level strategies relevant to equilibrium play, we propose the initialization of reinforcement learning data collection at intermediate states sampled from offline data to facilitate exploration of strategically relevant subgames. Referring to this method as Data-Augmented Game Starts (DAGS), we perform experiments using synthetic datasets and analytically tractable, long-horizon control variants of two-player Kuhn Poker, Goofspiel, and a counterexample game designed to penalize biased beliefs over hidden information. Under fixed computational budgets, DAGS enables regularized policy gradient methods to achieve lower exploitability in games with significantly more challenging exploration. We show that augmenting starting state distributions when solving imperfect information games can lead to biased equilibria, and we provide a straightforward mitigation to this in the form of multi-task observation flags. Finally, we release a new set of benchmark environments that drastically increase exploration challenges and state counts in existing OpenSpiel games while keeping exploitability measurements analytically tractable.

</details>


### [260] [Unsupervised learning of acquisition variability in structural connectomes via hybrid latent space modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13933)
*Gaurav Rudravaram,Lianrui Zuo,Karthik Ramadass,Elyssa McMaster,Jongyeon Yoon,Aravind R. Krishnan,Adam M. Saunders,Chenyu Gao,Nancy R. Newlin,Praitayini Kanakaraj,Lori L. Beason Held,Murat Bilgel,Laura A. Barquero,Micah DArchangel,Tin Q. Nguyen,Laurie B. Cutting,Derek Archer,Timothy J. Hohman,Daniel C. Moyer,Bennett A. Landman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种无需手动调参的无监督框架（Architectural Annealing），通过架构退火技术让混合连续-离散潜变量模型自动分离dMRI数据中的采集效应与生物变异，在7,416个结构连接组数据集上优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: dMRI数据跨站点、扫描仪和协议存在采集差异，这些变异会干扰结构连接组分析。传统降维方法将所有变异视为连续变量，导致采集效应被吸收到连续空间中；而现有的混合潜变量模型虽能分离离散和连续成分，但需要手动调整容量来确保离散成分捕捉到目标变异，缺乏自适应能力。

Method: 提出Joint-VAE无监督框架，核心创新在于对编码器输出进行"架构退火"（architectural annealing），即在解码之前自适应地平衡离散和连续潜变量，而非像以往方法那样仅通过损失函数退火。数据为7,416个dMRI结构连接组（年龄2-102岁，13个研究，25种采集参数组合），包括认知正常、MCI和AD患者。

Result: 与标准VAE、PCA+k-means聚类以及仅损失退火的混合模型相比，架构退火方法在站点学习上取得显著更优的ARI=0.53（p<0.05）。Joint-VAE恢复的聚类与扫描仪和协议差异高度对齐。

Conclusion: 混合连续-离散潜空间结合架构退火机制，能够无监督地有效分离dMRI中的采集变异，为跨站点/协议的结构连接组分析提供了一种无需手动调参的实用方案。

Abstract: Acquisition differences across sites, scanners, and protocols in dMRI introduce variability that complicates structural connectome analysis. This motivates deep learning models that can represent high-dimensional connectomes in a low-dimensional space while explicitly separating acquisition-related effects from biological variation. Conventional dimensionality reduction methods model all variance as continuous, so acquisition effects often get absorbed into a continuous latent space. Recent hybrid latent-space models combine discrete and continuous components to address this, but typically require manual capacity tuning to ensure the discrete component captures the intended variability. We introduce an unsupervised framework that removes this manual tuning by architecturally annealing encoder outputs before decoding, allowing the model to adaptively balance discrete and continuous latent variables during training. To evaluate it, we curated a dataset of N=7,416 structural connectomes derived from dMRI, spanning ages 2 to 102 and 13 studies with 25 unique acquisition-parameter combinations. Of these, 5,900 are cognitively unimpaired, 877 have mild cognitive impairment (MCI), and 639 have Alzheimer's disease (AD). We compare against a standard VAE, PCA with k-means clustering, and hybrid models that anneal only through the loss function. Our architectural annealing produces stronger site learning (ARI=0.53, p<0.05) than these baselines. Results show that a hybrid continuous-discrete latent space, with architectural rather than loss-based annealing, provides a useful unsupervised mechanism for capturing acquisition variability in dMRI: by jointly modeling smooth and categorical structure, the Joint-VAE recovers clusters aligned with scanner and protocol differences.

</details>


### [261] [Beyond Mode-Seeking RL: Trajectory-Balance Post-Training for Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13935)
*Saba Ahmadi,Prasanna Parthasarathi,Yufei Cui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TraFL是一种针对扩散语言模型的后训练方法，通过轨迹平衡目标解决"轨迹锁定"问题，在数学推理和代码生成任务上持续优于基线和现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散语言模型后训练方法过度追求奖励最大化，导致"轨迹锁定"——模型将概率过度集中到少数去噪路径上，在重复采样时丢失了对其他正确解决方案的覆盖。

Method: 提出TraFL（轨迹流平衡），采用轨迹平衡目标将策略训练向奖励倾斜的目标分布，并锚定到冻结的参考模型。具体包括扩散兼容的序列级替代函数和可学习的提示相关归一化方法。

Result: 在数学推理和代码生成基准测试中，TraFL是唯一在每种评估长度设置下均优于基线的后训练方法，且优势随采样预算增加而持续。在Minerva Math和LiveCodeBench等未见评估中表现最佳。

Conclusion: TraFL有效解决了扩散语言模型后训练中的轨迹锁定问题，为扩散模型的优化提供了新的思路，在多项基准测试中展现了持续且稳定的性能提升。

Abstract: Diffusion language models are a promising alternative to autoregressive models, yet post-training methods for them largely adapt reward-maximizing objectives. We identify a central failure mode in this setting we call trajectory locking: sampled reward-driven updates over-concentrate probability mass onto a narrow set of denoising paths, reducing coverage of alternative correct solutions under repeated sampling. To address this, we propose TraFL (Trajectory Flow baLancing), a trajectory-balance objective that trains the policy toward a reward-tilted target distribution anchored to a frozen reference model. We make this practical for diffusion language models with a diffusion-compatible sequence-level surrogate and a learned prompt-dependent normalization. Across mathematical reasoning and code generation benchmarks, TraFL is the only evaluated post-training method that improves over the base model in every benchmark-length setting, with gains that persist as the sampling budget increases. The improvements transfer to held-out evaluations: TraFL stays above the base model on Minerva Math and is the strongest method on every LiveCodeBench difficulty split.

</details>


### [262] [Towards the Next Frontier of LLMs, Training on Private Data: A Cross-Domain Benchmark for Federated Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13936)
*Daniel M. Jimenez-Gutierrez,Enrique Zuazua,Georgios Kellaris,Joaquin del Rio,Oleksii Sliusarenko,Xabi Uribe-Etxebarria*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于联邦学习的框架，使多个机构能在不共享私有数据的情况下联合微调大语言模型（LLM），并在医疗和金融领域的四个基准数据集上验证了其有效性。实验表明，联邦微调性能接近集中式训练，优于单机构独立学习，且QLoRA和IA3等参数高效微调策略在绿色AI视角下兼顾了效率与精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型的成功依赖海量公开数据，但最有价值的信息往往分布在多个机构的私有数据中，受隐私、监管和组织壁垒限制无法共享。此外，这些数据存在非独立同分布（non-IID）问题，进一步增加了跨机构协作的难度。因此，有必要探索一种能在保护数据隐私的前提下，利用分布式私有数据提升LLM能力的方法。

Method: 基于Sherpa.ai联邦学习平台构建框架，各节点在本地数据上使用参数高效微调（PEFT）策略（LoRA、QLoRA、IA3）联合微调共享LLM，无需交换原始数据。在医疗（MedQA, MedMCQA）和金融（FPB, FiQA-SA）四个问答与分类数据集上，模拟非IID数据分布进行跨领域基准评估。

Result: 联邦微调的性能接近集中式训练，显著优于单机构独立学习。在绿色AI方面，QLoRA和IA3在保持有限精度损失的情况下大幅提升了训练效率。

Conclusion: 联邦参数高效微调（federated PEFT）是在数据无法共享场景下适配LLM的可行且实用的方案，为利用分布式私有数据推动LLM在医疗、金融等高度监管领域的发展提供了有效路径。

Abstract: The recent success of large language models (LLMs) has been largely driven by vast public datasets. However, the next frontier for LLM development lies beyond public data. Much of the world's most valuable information is private, especially in highly regulated sectors such as healthcare and finance, where data include patient histories or customer communications. Unlocking this data could represent a major leap forward, enabling LLMs with deeper domain expertise and stronger real-world utility. Yet, these data cannot be shared because they are distributed across institutions and constrained by privacy, regulatory, and organizational barriers. Moreover, institutional datasets are typically non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID), differing across sites in population characteristics, data modalities, documentation patterns, and task-specific label distributions.
  In this paper, we demonstrate a practical approach to unlocking private and distributed institutional data for LLM adaptation through federated collaboration across data silos. Built on the Sherpa.ai Federated Learning platform, our framework enables nodes to jointly fine-tune a shared LLM without exchanging private data. We evaluate this approach through a cross-domain benchmark in healthcare and finance, using four closed-ended question answering and classification datasets: MedQA, MedMCQA, FPB, and FiQA-SA. We compare three parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) strategies-LoRA, QLoRA, and IA3-across pretrained backbones under non-IID settings reflecting institutional data heterogeneity. Our results show that federated fine-tuning performs close to centralized training and outperforms isolated single-institution learning. From a Green AI perspective, QLoRA and IA3 improve efficiency with limited accuracy degradation, supporting federated PEFT as a viable approach for adapting LLMs where data cannot be shared.

</details>


### [263] [EvolveMem:Self-Evolving Memory Architecture via AutoResearch for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13941)
*Jiaqi Liu,Xinyu Ye,Peng Xia,Zeyu Zheng,Cihang Xie,Mingyu Ding,Huaxiu Yao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EvolveMem提出一种自演化记忆架构，不仅存储知识会更新，检索机制本身也会通过LLM驱动的诊断模块自动调优，在多个基准上显著超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体记忆系统仅更新存储内容，而检索配置（评分函数、融合策略、答案生成策略）在部署后冻结，无法实现真正自适应的长期记忆。

Method: EvolveMem将完整检索配置暴露为结构化动作空间，通过LLM诊断模块读取失败日志、识别根因、提出配置调整，并通过带自动回退（revert-on-regression）和探索停滞（explore-on-stagnation）机制的元分析器执行闭环自演化。

Result: 在LoCoMo上相比最强基线提升25.7%，相比最简基线提升78.0%；在MemBench上相比最强基线提升18.9%。演化出的配置可跨基准正向迁移，验证了学到的通用检索原理。

Conclusion: 记忆系统的检索机制应与存储内容共同演化，自演化过程能自动发现通用且可迁移的有效检索策略，替代人工调参。

Abstract: Long-term memory is essential for LLM agents that operate across multiple sessions, yet existing memory systems treat retrieval infrastructure as fixed: stored content evolves while scoring functions, fusion strategies, and answer-generation policies remain frozen at deployment. We argue that truly adaptive memory requires co-evolution at two levels: the stored knowledge and the retrieval mechanism that queries it. We present EvolveMem, a self-evolving memory architecture that exposes its full retrieval configuration as a structured action space optimized by an LLM-powered diagnosis module. In each evolution round, the module reads per-question failure logs, identifies root causes, and proposes targeted configuration adjustments; a guarded meta-analyzer applies them with automatic revert-on-regression and explore-on-stagnation safeguards. This closed-loop self-evolution realizes an AutoResearch process: the system autonomously conducts iterative research cycles on its own architecture, replacing manual configuration tuning. Starting from a minimal baseline, the process converges autonomously, discovering effective retrieval strategies including entirely new configuration dimensions not present in the original action space. On LoCoMo, EvolveMem outperforms the strongest baseline by 25.7% relative and achieves a 78.0% relative improvement over the minimal baseline. On MemBench, EvolveMem exceeds the strongest baseline by 18.9% relative. Evolved configurations transfer across benchmarks with positive rather than catastrophic transfer, indicating that the self-evolution process captures universal retrieval principles rather than benchmark-specific heuristics. Code is available at https://github.com/aiming-lab/SimpleMem.

</details>


### [264] [EMA: Efficient Model Adaptation for Learning-based Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13942)
*Daiyang Yu,Xinyu Chen,Yihan Zhang,Yan Liang,Yaqi Qiao,Fan Lai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EMA是一个模型自适应系统，通过学习环境状态对齐和数据标注优先级优化，降低学习型系统在动态环境中的适配成本（GPU训练时间降低14.9-42.4%），同时提升系统性能（如网络吞吐量提升6.9-31.3%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学习型系统缺乏对环境变化的适应能力，导致模型训练成本高、数据收集量大、系统性能下降和响应缓慢。

Method: 提出EMA系统，核心包含两个设计：（1）状态变换器（state transformers）将新环境的输入状态对齐到先前相似状态，实现模型热启动；（2）优先标注高效用数据，平衡训练与标注成本之间的权衡。

Result: 在8个代表性学习型系统上，EMA降低适配成本14.9-42.4%，提升系统性能6.9-31.3%。

Conclusion: EMA是首个支持学习型系统在动态环境中以最小开销进行模型自适应的系统，验证了系统驱动、数据为中心的思路在解决部署挑战中的有效性。

Abstract: Machine learning (ML) is increasingly applied to optimize system performance in tasks such as resource management and network simulation. Unlike traditional ML tasks (e.g., image classification), networked systems often operate in heterogeneous, long-running, and dynamic environment states, where input conditions (e.g., network loads) and operational objectives can shift over time and across settings. Existing learning-based systems offer little support for adaptation, resulting in costly model training, extensive data collection, degraded system performance, and slow responsiveness.
  This paper presents EMA, the first model adaptation system supporting learning-based systems to adapt to evolving environments with minimal operational overhead. EMA takes a system-driven, data-centric approach that accommodates diverse system and model designs while addressing two key deployment challenges. First, it reduces expensive model training by introducing state transformers that align the input state of a new environment with previously similar states, allowing models to warm-start adaptation. Second, it addresses the often-overlooked yet costly process of data labeling--collecting ground truth for exploring and training on various system decisions--by prioritizing labeling high-utility data while balancing the tradeoff between training and labeling cost. Evaluations on eight representative learning-based systems show that EMA reduces adaptation costs (e.g., GPU training time) by 14.9-42.4% while improving system performance (e.g., network throughput) by 6.9-31.3%.

</details>


### [265] [A Unified Geometric Framework for Weighted Contrastive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13943)
*Raphael Vock,Edouard Duchesnay,Benoit Dufumier*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过将加权InfoNCE目标解释为距离几何问题，揭示了对比学习的几何本质，分析了不同加权方案下最优嵌入的精确特征，包括监督对比学习中的类别不平衡问题以及连续标签设置中的几何不匹配问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对比学习旨在通过保留样本间的关系结构来学习表示，但所得嵌入的几何特性尚不清楚，本文旨在从距离几何的角度提供严格的理论理解。

Method: 将加权InfoNCE目标重新解释为距离几何问题（DGP），通过理论分析推导出不同加权方案下最优嵌入的精确解，包括监督、弱监督和连续标签设置。

Result: （1）SupCon和Soft SupCon在分类中将同类样本坍缩为单一原型；（2）平衡SupCon恢复经典正则单形体几何，但类别不平衡破坏对称性；（3）Soft SupCon在类别不平衡下仍保持正则单形体；（4）y-Aware CL在连续标签设置中因欧几里得标签权重与球形潜相似度不匹配而无法达到熵最优。

Conclusion: 加权方案的选择决定了对比学习是否在几何上可实现、退化或不一致，为设计对比学习目标提供了理论框架。

Abstract: Contrastive learning (CL) aims to preserve relational structure between samples by learning representations that reflect a similarity graph. Yet, the geometry of the resulting embeddings remains poorly understood. Here we show that weighted InfoNCE objectives can be interpreted as Distance Geometry Problems, where the weighting scheme specifies the target geometry to be realized by the representation. This viewpoint yields exact characterizations of the optimal embeddings for several supervised and weakly supervised objectives. In supervised classification, both SupCon and Soft SupCon (a dense relaxation of it where pairs from distinct classes have small non-zero similarity) collapse samples within each class to a single prototype. However, while balanced SupCon recovers the classical regular simplex geometry, class imbalance breaks this symmetry: SupCon induces non-uniform inter-class similarities depending on class sizes, whereas Soft SupCon preserves a regular simplex geometry regardless of class imbalance. In continuous-label settings, our framework reveals a different failure mode: y-Aware CL generally cannot attain its entropic optimum unless the labels lie on a hypersphere, exposing a mismatch between Euclidean label weights and spherical latent similarity. By contrast, geometrically consistent choices such as Euclidean-Euclidean weighting or X-CLR admit unique optimal embeddings. Our results show that the choice of weighting scheme determines whether contrastive learning is geometrically realizable, degenerate, or inconsistent, providing a principled framework for designing contrastive objectives.

</details>


### [266] [Collider-Bench: Benchmarking AI Agents with Particle Physics Analysis Reproduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13950)
*Darius A. Faroughy,Sofia Palacios Schweitzer,Ian Pang,Siddharth Mishra-Sharma,David Shih*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了Collider-Bench基准，用于评估LLM代理能否仅通过公开论文和科学软件复现大型强子对撞机的实验分析，涉及长时域工具使用任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准难以捕捉真实科学工作的复杂性和细微差别，且LHC分析因公共工具链近似性及论文细节缺失而难以复现。

Method: 将已发表分析转化为可执行的模拟-选择流水线，提交指定信号区的事件产额预测；使用直方图指标提供连续保真度评分，并报告计算成本；引入LLM法官评估代码和会话轨迹以检测伪造、幻觉和重复等故障模式。

Result: 在通用编码代理的能力阶梯上评估，平均而言没有代理能可靠地击败物理学家参与循环的解决方案。

Conclusion: 当前自主LLM代理在复现科学实验分析方面仍不及人类专家，该基准为评估和提升AI科学推理能力提供了有效的测试平台。

Abstract: Autonomous language-model agents are increasingly evaluated on long-horizon tool-use tasks, but existing benchmarks rarely capture the complexity and nuance of real scientific work. To address this gap, we introduce Collider-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating whether LLM agents can reproduce experimental analyses from the Large Hadron Collider (LHC) using only public papers and open scientific software. Such analyses are often difficult to reproduce because the public toolchain only approximates the software used internally by the experimental collaborations, while the published papers inevitably omit implementation details needed for a faithful reconstruction. Agents must therefore rely on physical reasoning, domain knowledge, and trial-and-error to fill these gaps. Each task requires the agent to turn a published analysis into an executable simulation-and-selection pipeline and submit predicted collision event yields in specified signal regions. These predictions are evaluated with standard histogram metrics that provide continuous fidelity scores without a hand-written rubric. We also report the computational cost incurred by each agent per task. Finally, we evaluate the codebase and full session trace using an LLM judge to catch qualitative failure modes such as fabrications, hallucinations and duplications. We release an initial set of tasks drawn from LHC searches, together with a containerized sandbox and event simulation tools. We evaluate across a capability ladder of general purpose coding agents. Our results show that on average no agent reliably beats the physicist-in-the-loop solution.

</details>


### [267] [Croissant Baker: Metadata Generation for Discoverable, Governable, and Reusable ML Datasets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15079)
*Rafi Al Attrach,Rajna Fani,Sebastian Lobentanzer,Joan Giner-Miguelez,Debanshu Das,Varuni H. K.,Nobin Sarwar,Rajat Ghosh,Anwai Archit,Surbhi Motghare,Christina Conrad Parry,Luis Oala,Lara Grosso,Joaquin Vanschoren,Steffen Vogler,Sujata Goswami,Eric S. Rosenthal,Marzyeh Ghassemi,Matthew McDermott,Tom Pollard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文介绍Croissant Baker，一个本地优先的开源命令行工具，可直接从数据集目录生成经过验证的Croissant元数据，解决了Croissant标准在大型本地数据集上应用困难的问题。在140多个数据集上评估，包括MIMIC-IV（8.86亿行、374个Parquet文件），与标准真值对比达到97-100%的一致率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Croissant已成为机器学习数据集元数据标准，NeurIPS要求数据集提交必须包含其元数据。但实际中生成Croissant通常需要将数据上传到公共平台，这对受治理的大型本地存储库不可行，而这些存储库包含了ML日益依赖的大量高价值数据。

Method: 开发了Croissant Baker——一个本地优先的开源命令行工具，通过模块化处理器注册表直接从数据集目录生成经过验证的Croissant元数据。

Result: 在140多个数据集上评估，扩展到MIMIC-IV（8.86亿行、374个Parquet文件）。在与生产作者或标准来源参考真值的保留对比中，Croissant Baker在多个领域达到97-100%的一致率。

Conclusion: Croissant Baker有效解决了大型本地数据集生成Croissant元数据的难题，实现了高精度自动化生成，促进了受治理数据集的可发现性和可复现性。

Abstract: Croissant has emerged as the metadata standard for machine learning datasets, providing a structured, JSON-LD-based format that makes dataset discovery, automated ingestion, and reproducible analysis machine-checkable across ML platforms. Adoption has accelerated, and NeurIPS now requires Croissant metadata in every submission to its dataset tracks. Yet in practice Croissant generation usually starts with uploading data to a public platform, a path infeasible for governed and large local repositories that hold much of the high-value data ML increasingly relies on. We release Croissant Baker, a local-first, open-source command-line tool that generates validated Croissant metadata directly from a dataset directory through a modular handler registry. We evaluate Croissant Baker on over 140 datasets, scaling to MIMIC-IV at 886 million rows and 374 Parquet files. On held-out comparisons against producer-authored or standards-derived ground truth, Croissant Baker reaches 97-100% agreement across multiple domains.

</details>


### [268] [WarmPrior: Straightening Flow-Matching Policies with Temporal Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13959)
*Sinjae Kang,Chanyoung Kim,Kaixin Wang,Li Zhao,Kimin Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 通过将标准高斯分布替换为基于近期动作历史的WarmPrior作为源分布，在扩散/流匹配的机器人控制中显著提升任务成功率。其效果源于更平直的概率路径（类似Rectified Flow中的最优传输耦合），并在行为克隆和强化学习中均带来性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在生成式策略（扩散模型/流匹配）主导的视觉运动机器人控制中，标准高斯源分布是默认选择，但该设计的潜在影响尚未被充分探索。本文旨在验证源分布本身是一个重要的设计维度。

Method: 提出WarmPrior，一个简单的时间锚定先验分布，利用现成的近期动作历史构建，替代标准高斯分布作为生成过程的源分布。

Result: 1) 在机器人操作任务上持续提升成功率；2) 概率路径明显更平直，重现了Rectified Flow中最优传输耦合的效果；3) 在prior空间的强化学习中提高样本效率和最终性能。

Conclusion: 源分布是生成式机器人控制中一个被忽视但重要的设计维度，WarmPrior作为一种简单有效的替代方案，在多种范式下均能带来增益。

Abstract: Generative policies based on diffusion and flow matching have become a dominant paradigm for visuomotor robotic control. We show that replacing the standard Gaussian source distribution with WarmPrior, a simple temporally grounded prior constructed from readily available recent action history, consistently improves success rates on robotic manipulation tasks. We trace this gain to markedly straighter probability paths, echoing the effect of optimal-transport couplings in Rectified Flow. Beyond standard behavior cloning, WarmPrior also reshapes the exploration distribution in prior-space reinforcement learning, improving both sample efficiency and final performance. Collectively, these results identify the source distribution as an important and underexplored design axis in generative robot control.

</details>


### [269] [Towards Resource-Efficient LLMs: End-to-End Energy Accounting of Distillation Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13981)
*Katherine Lambert,Sasha Luccioni*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个全面的能耗核算框架，用于测量知识蒸馏和合成数据微调两种常见蒸馏方法的完整端到端能耗，并构建了能耗-质量帕累托前沿，揭示了先前被忽视的教师侧成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型的部署激增导致GPU需求和数据中心规模扩张，引发了对电力消耗和电网压力的担忧。蒸馏常被宣传为获得更高效模型的途径，但这些说法很少考虑完整的端到端能源和资源成本，包括教师端的工作负载（如数据生成、logit缓存和评估）。

Method: 提出了一个全面的能耗核算框架，通过对GPU设备功耗进行详细的阶段级跟踪，测量蒸馏管线的完整计算成本。实验中对不同阶段的能耗进行分离和记录，系统测量了两种常见蒸馏方法（基于logit的知识蒸馏和基于合成数据的监督微调）的能耗和排放，构建了能耗-质量帕累托前沿。

Result: 揭示了先前被忽视的蒸馏能耗成本，构建了能耗-质量帕累托前沿，并得出了在能耗和预算约束下选择蒸馏方法和超参数的实用设计规则。

Conclusion: 开源了一个测量工具和核算协议，为可比较、可复现的蒸馏研究提供标准化基础，明确核算完整管线的能耗影响。

Abstract: The rise in deployment of large language models has driven a surge in GPU demand and datacenter scaling, raising concerns about electricity use, grid stress, and the impacts of modern AI workloads. Distillation is often promoted as one of the most effective paths to obtain cheaper, more efficient models, yet these claims rarely account for the full end-to-end energy and resource costs, including crucial teacher-side workloads such as data generation, logit caching, and evaluation. We present a comprehensive energy accounting framework that measures the complete computational cost of distillation pipelines via detailed stage-wise tracking of GPU device power consumption. In our experiments, we separate and log empirical energy use across distinct phases and systematically measure the energy and emissions of two common distillation methods: the classic logit-based knowledge distillation and synthetic-data supervised fine-tuning, constructing energy-quality Pareto frontiers that expose the previously ignored costs. From these measurements and analyses, we derive practical design rules for selecting distillation methods and hyperparameters under energy and budget constraints, and release an open-source measurement harness and accounting protocol to provide a standardized foundation for comparable, reproducible distillation research, explicitly accountable for complete pipeline energy impact.

</details>


### [270] [TabPFN-3: Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13986)
*Léo Grinsztajn,Klemens Flöge,Oscar Key,Felix Birkel,Philipp Jund,Brendan Roof,Mihir Manium,Shi Bin,Hoo,Magnus Bühler,Anurag Garg,Dominik Safaric,Jake Robertson,Benjamin Jäger,Simone Alessi,Adrian Hayler,Vladyslav Moroshan,Lennart Purucker,Philipp Singer,Alan Arazi,Julien Siems,Jan Hendrik Metzen,Georg Grab,Nick Erickson,Siyuan Guo,Eliott Kalfon,Simon Bing,David Salinas,Clara Cornu,Lilly Charlotte Wehrhahn,Diana Kriuchkova,Kursat Kaya,Lydia Sidhoum,Marie Salmon,Jerry Chen,Madelon Hulsebos,Yann LeCun,Samuel Müller,Bernhard Schölkopf,Sauraj Gambhir,Noah Hollmann,Frank Hutter*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TabPFN-3是专为表格数据设计的基座模型升级版，支持100万行训练数据，训练和推理速度大幅提升，在TabArena等多个基准测试中超越所有基线模型，并首次引入测试时计算缩放，同时支持时序、关系型和表格-文本数据，性能达到SOTA水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 表格数据在科学和工业领域的高价值预测问题中至关重要，TabPFN开创了该模态的基座模型，但现有版本在大规模数据和效率方面仍有不足，需要提升可扩展性和性能。

Method: TabPFN-3基于用户反馈，在先验合成数据上预训练，扩展到100万训练行；引入测试时计算缩放（Test-Time Compute Scaling）；通过减少KV缓存和行分块（row-chunking）技术实现单张H100上处理100万行数据。

Result: 在TabArena上以单次前向传播超越所有模型（包括调参和集成的基线）；在多达200个特征、100万行数据上击败8小时调参的梯度提升树；TabPFN-3-Plus在TabArena上超越非TabPFN模型200+ Elo（大数据子集上420 Elo），比AutoGluon 1.5 extreme快10倍；在RelBenchV1和TabSTAR上达到SOTA；SHAP值计算快120倍；整体速度比TabPFN-2.5快20倍。

Conclusion: TabPFN-3在表格数据预测的精度、速度和可扩展性上全面突破，拓展到更多数据模态（时序、关系型、表格-文本），且无需LLM、真实数据或互联网搜索，展现了纯合成数据预训练的基座模型的巨大潜力。

Abstract: Tabular data underpins most high-value prediction problems in science and industry, and TabPFN has driven the foundation model revolution for this modality. Designed with feedback from our users, TabPFN-3 builds on this foundation to scale state-of-the-art performance to datasets with 1M training rows and substantially reduce training and inference time. Pretrained exclusively on synthetic data from our prior, TabPFN-3 dramatically pushes the frontier of tabular prediction and brings substantial gains on time series, relational, and tabular-text data. On the standard tabular benchmark TabArena, a forward pass of TabPFN-3 outperforms all other models, including tuned and ensembled baselines, by a significant margin, and pareto-dominates the speed/performance frontier. On more diverse datasets, TabPFN-3 ranks first on datasets with many classes, and beats 8-hour-tuned gradient-boosted-tree baselines on datasets up to 1M training rows and 200 features. TabPFN-3 introduces test-time compute scaling to tabular foundation models. Our API offering TabPFN-3-Plus (Thinking) exploits this to beat all non-TabPFN models by over 200 Elo on TabArena, rising to 420 Elo on the largest data subset, and outperforms AutoGluon 1.5 extreme while being 10x faster, without using LLMs, real data, internet search or any other model besides TabPFN. TabPFN-3 extends the capabilities of our models, enabling SOTA prediction on relational data (new SOTA foundation model on RelBenchV1) and tabular-text data (SOTA on TabSTAR via TabPFN-3-Plus); and improves existing integrations: a specialized checkpoint, TabPFN-TS-3, ranks 2nd on the time-series benchmark fev-bench, and SHAP-value computation is up to 120x faster. TabPFN-3 achieves this performance while being up to 20x faster than TabPFN-2.5. In addition, a reduced KV cache and row-chunking scale to 1M rows on one H100 with fast inference speed.

</details>


### [271] [Neural Fields for NV-Center Inverse Sensing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13988)
*Zhixuan Zhao,Tao Zhong,Yixun Hu,Nathalie P. de Leon,Christine Allen-Blanchette*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对基于NV中心的量子传感逆问题，本文发现传统标量近似会导致"中心坍缩"失效模式，提出NeTMY——一种无摊销的坐标神经场结合可微NV前向模型，通过退火位置编码、多尺度优化、稀疏门控和频谱保真损失，在修正后的张量算符下实现了最优的空间定位与分布度量，并将NV量子传感确立为物理保真神经逆问题的有效测试平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学传感中的逆问题常依赖手工正则器或监督网络，但当前向模型具有非线性、光谱耦合和物理敏感性时，这两种方法均可能失效。本文以NV色心量子传感为场景，揭示传统标量/相干前向近似的不准确性，以及由此导致的自由密度优化中的"中心坍缩"失效模式，从而提出更物理保真的求解方案。

Method: 提出NeTMY，一种无摊销的坐标神经场，与可微NV前向模型耦合；包含退火位置编码、多尺度优化、稀疏门控和频谱保真损失。同时将传统标量/相干前向近似替换为张量幂求和偶极算符，以更准确地建模物理过程。

Result: 在修正算符生成的稀疏合成重建数据上，NeTMY在定位精度和分布度量指标上达到最优。机制实验表明NeTMY并非直接执行原始密度空间梯度，而是通过参数化平滑和重新分布更新，缓解了中心坍缩病理现象。

Conclusion: NeTMY有效解决了NV量子传感逆问题中的中心坍缩失效模式，证明了物理保真前向建模与神经场的结合在科学逆问题中的价值，并将NV量子传感定位为这类方法的重要测试平台。

Abstract: Inverse problems in scientific sensing are often solved with either hand-designed regularizers or supervised networks trained on simulated labels, yet both can fail when the forward model is nonlinear, spectrally coupled, and physically delicate. We study this issue for noise sensing based on nitrogen-vacancy (NV) centers in diamond, where a quantum sensor measures magnetic-noise spectra generated by sparse spin sources. We show that replacing a common scalar/coherent forward approximation with a tensor power-summed dipolar operator changes the inverse landscape and exposes a center-collapse failure mode in free-density optimization. We propose NeTMY, an amortization-free coordinate neural field coupled to the differentiable NV forward model, with annealed positional encoding, multiscale optimization, sparsity/gating, and spectrum-fidelity losses. Across sparse synthetic reconstructions generated by the corrected operator, NeTMY achieves the best localization and distributional metrics in the tested benchmark. Mechanism experiments show that NeTMY does not directly execute the raw density-space gradient; its parameterization smooths and redistributes updates, mitigating the center-collapse pathology. These results position NV quantum sensing as a useful testbed for physics-faithful neural inverse problems.

</details>


### [272] [An Amortized Efficiency Threshold for Comparing Neural and Heuristic Solvers in Combinatorial Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14624)
*Sohaib Afifi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出摊销效率阈值（AET）框架，反驳“神经组合优化求解器训练成本高因此净效率低”的论点。通过对比神经求解器（GPU训练+推理）与启发式方法（CPU推理）的总能耗/碳排放，证明当部署实例数超过阈值（约1.58×10⁵）时，神经求解器在能量效率上可胜出。核心贡献在于理论框架、开源工具和测量协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 常见批评认为神经组合优化求解器因GPU训练能耗高而整体效率低于CPU元启发式方法，但这种批评混淆了固定训练成本与可摊销的推理成本。本文旨在纠正这一推理错误，建立公平比较框架。

Method: 定义摊销效率阈值（AET）：在给定解质量约束下，神经求解器总能耗/碳排放与启发式基线持平的部署实例数量。推导出当神经求解器单实例获胜时，累积能耗比趋于小于1的常数，且该极限与训练成本测量方式无关。在MTVRP环境（n=20，19种变体，5个训练种子）中以HGS（PyVRP）为基线进行实证验证。

Result: 实测交叉点约为1.58×10⁵个部署实例；单实例能耗比0.41（神经求解器占优），但受限于测试实例规模较小。

Conclusion: 核心贡献是理论框架、开源工具和测量协议；更大问题规模下的比值结构性收敛留待未来工作。该框架为神经求解器的能源效率评估提供了更合理的比较基准。

Abstract: A common critique of neural combinatorial-optimization solvers is that they are less energy-efficient than CPU metaheuristics, given the operational energy cost of training them on GPUs. This paper examines the inferential step from "training is expensive" to "neural solvers are net-inefficient", which is where the critique actually goes wrong. Training the network costs a large fixed amount of GPU energy; running the metaheuristic costs a small amount of CPU energy on every instance, repeated as long as the solver is deployed. The two are not commensurable until a deployment volume is fixed. We define the Amortized Efficiency Threshold (AET) as the deployment volume above which a neural solver breaks even with a heuristic baseline in total energy or carbon, under an explicit constraint on solution quality. We show that the cumulative-energy ratio between the two solvers tends to a constant strictly below one whenever the network wins per-instance, and that this limit does not depend on how the training cost was measured. An embodied-carbon term amortizes hardware fabrication symmetrically on both sides. We instantiate the framework on the Multi-Task VRP (MTVRP) environment at n=20 customers across 19 problem variants and five training seeds, with HGS via PyVRP as the heuristic baseline. The measured crossover sits near $1.58 \times 10^5$ deployed instances; the per-instance ratio is 0.41, reflecting the moderate size of the instances tested. The contribution is the framework, the open instrumentation, and the measurement protocol; structural convergence of the ratio at larger problem sizes is left to future empirical work.

</details>


### [273] [HodgeCover: Higher-Order Topological Coverage Drives Compression of Sparse Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13997)
*Tao Zhong,Dongzhe Zheng,Christine Allen-Blanchette*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现稀疏MoE层中专家合并存在三元不可约环路的根本性障碍，通过2-复形上的调和核与Hodge分解将其形式化，并提出HodgeCover方法实现无训练压缩，在激进压缩场景下表现最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无训练MoE压缩方法基于两两专家间的兼容性进行合并，但存在根本性盲区：三个专家两两兼容时仍可能形成不可约的合并环路（三元冲突），导致任何基于成对信号的评分方法在结构上无法识别哪些三元组是可联合合并的。

Method: 将专家视为顶点、KL散度屏障视为边、三元组屏障视为面，构建2-复形；利用Hodge分解将边屏障信号分解，精确分离出调和核（即障碍的核心数学对象）；提出HodgeCover方法，贪婪地覆盖调和关键边和三元组关键三角形，并设计混合变体结合权重剪枝。

Result: 在三个开源稀疏MoE模型上进行激进的专家压缩实验，HodgeCover在纯专家缩减轴上匹配SOTA，在混合轴（激进压缩）上领先，并且在所有四个Hodge分量上实现平衡的质量保留。

Conclusion: 揭示MoE结构的调和核从根本上改变了在最重要（激进压缩）场景下的压缩器选择，证明了拓扑方法对模型压缩的有效性。

Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layers route tokens through a handful of experts, and learning-free compression of these layers reduces inference cost without retraining. A subtle obstruction blocks every existing compressor in this family: three experts can each be pairwise compatible yet form an irreducible cycle when merged together, so any score that ranks experts on pairwise signals is structurally blind to which triples are jointly mergeable. We show the obstruction is a precise mathematical object, the harmonic kernel of the simplicial Laplacian on a 2-complex whose vertices are experts, whose edges carry KL merge barriers, and whose faces carry triplet barriers; Hodge-decomposing the edge-barrier signal isolates the kernel exactly. We turn the diagnostic into a selection objective: HodgeCover greedily covers the harmonic-critical edges and triplet-critical triangles, and a hybrid variant of HodgeCover pairs it with off-the-shelf weight pruning on survivors. On three open-weight Sparse MoE backbones under aggressive expert reduction, HodgeCover matches state-of-the-art learning-free baselines on the expert-reduction axis, leads on the aggressive-compression frontier of the hybrid axis, and uniquely balances retained mass across all four Hodge components. These results show that exposing the harmonic kernel of a learned MoE structure changes which compressor wins at the regime that matters most.

</details>


### [274] [Support Before Frequency in Discrete Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13999)
*Adrian Müller,Antoine Gonon,Zebang Shen,Ya-Ping Hsieh,Niao He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明离散扩散模型在去噪过程中，反向编辑会自然分离出支持结构（如语法有效性）和频率信息两个层级。支持恢复只需学习概率量级，而频率恢复需要更精细的系数估计。均匀扩散和吸收扩散展现出不同的分离机制，实验验证了支持定位先于频率排序的学习顺序。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散扩散模型在语言建模中表现越来越好，但其去噪目标函数如何组织学习过程尚不清楚。作者希望通过理论分析揭示其内在学习机制，特别是模型如何同时学习数据的支持结构（语法有效性）和频率分布。

Method: 首先在理论上证明，在小噪声（最终去噪步）情况下，均匀扩散和吸收扩散的单令牌反向编辑会分解为领先尺度（决定是否朝支持结构移动）和更精细的系数（决定同一尺度内的相对概率）。然后通过实验验证理论预测。

Result: 支持定位（有效性结构）在训练中比频率排序更早出现；均匀扩散和吸收扩散之间的对比符合理论预测的速率分离；均匀扩散呈现出有效性提升、保持和恶化三分类，而吸收扩散的主导质量集中在有效性提升的编辑上。

Conclusion: 离散扩散模型在学习过程中遵循"先学支持结构，再学频率信息"的层级化学习顺序，不同扩散机制（均匀vs吸收）对这种分离有不同影响。

Abstract: Discrete diffusion models are increasingly competitive for language modeling, yet it remains unclear how their denoising objectives organize learning. Although these objectives target the full data distribution, we show that the exact reverse process induces a hierarchy between coarse support information and finer frequency information. For uniform and absorbing (a.k.a. masking) diffusion, we prove that, in the small-noise regime of the final denoising steps, each single-token reverse edit decomposes into a leading scale, determined by whether it moves toward the data support (e.g., grammatically valid sentences), and a finer coefficient, determining relative probabilities within the same scale. Thus, recovering validity structure only requires learning the correct order of magnitude of reverse probabilities, whereas recovering data frequencies requires coefficient-level estimation. The separation is mechanism-dependent: uniform diffusion exhibits a trichotomy into validity-improving, validity-preserving, and validity-worsening edits, while absorbing diffusion places its leading-order mass on validity-improving moves. Experiments on a masked language diffusion model and synthetic regular-language tasks support these predictions: support-localization emerges earlier than within-support frequency ranking, and the contrast between uniform and absorbing diffusion matches the predicted rate separation. Together, our results suggest that discrete diffusion models learn data support before data frequencies.

</details>


### [275] [Dywave: Event-Aligned Dynamic Tokenization for Heterogeneous IoT Sensing Signal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14014)
*Tomoyoshi Kimura,Denizhan Kara,Jinyang Li,Hongjue Zhao,Yigong Hu,Yizhuo Chen,Xiaomin Ouyang,Shengzhong Liu,Tarek Abdelzaher*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Dywave是一种面向IoT感知信号的动态分词框架，利用小波分层分解识别语义事件边界，自适应压缩冗余区间，在五个真实数据集上实现高达12%的精度提升，同时将输入token长度减少75%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: IoT系统收集的感知信号具有非平稳、多尺度特性，标准分词技术难以有效处理这些信号的内在时间结构和物理事件边界。

Method: 提出Dywave框架，基于小波分层分解，识别与底层语义事件对应的时间边界，自适应压缩冗余区间，同时保持时间连贯性。

Result: 在五个真实IoT数据集（涵盖活动识别、压力评估、目标检测）上，相比现有方法精度提升达12%，输入token长度减少75%，计算效率显著提升，且对领域偏移和序列长度变化具有更强鲁棒性。

Conclusion: Dywave通过动态分词有效解决了IoT感知信号的表示学习问题，兼顾精度与效率，为资源受限的IoT场景提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Internet of Things (IoT) systems continuously collect heterogeneous sensing signals from ubiquitous sensors to support intelligent applications such as human activity analysis, emotion monitoring, and environmental perception. These signals are inherently non-stationary and multi-scale, posing unique challenges for standard tokenization techniques. This paper proposes Dywave, a dynamic tokenization framework for IoT sensing signals that constructs compact input representations aligned with intrinsic temporal structures and underlying physical events. Dywave leverages wavelet-based hierarchical decomposition, identifies meaningful temporal boundaries corresponding to underlying semantic events, and adaptively compresses redundant intervals while preserving temporal coherence. Extensive evaluations on five real-world IoT sensing datasets across activity recognition, stress assessment, and nearby object detection demonstrate that Dywave outperforms state-of-the-art methods by up to 12% in accuracy, while improving computational efficiency by reducing input token lengths by up to 75% across mainstream sequence models. Moreover, Dywave exhibits improved robustness to domain shifts and varying sequence lengths.

</details>


### [276] [R2R2: Robust Representation for Intensive Experience Reuse via Redundancy Reduction in Self-Predictive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14026)
*Sanghyeob Song,Donghyeok Lee,Jinsik Kim,Sungroh Yoon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对高更新-数据比（UTD）下自我预测学习（SPL）中的表征过拟合问题，提出基于冗余缩减的鲁棒表征方法（R2R2），通过非中心化目标改进SPL，在11个连续控制任务上验证有效性，提升TD7约22%并增强SimbaV2-SPL的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作主要关注critic偏差，但对SPL在高UTD regime下的表征层面不稳定性研究不足。数据匮乏场景（如机器人）中频繁数据重用虽提升效率但导致过拟合，亟需解决。

Method: 提出R2R2，一种在SPL内的正则化方法。理论识别标准零中心化与SPL谱特性冲突，设计非中心化目标。在TD7等SPL原生算法上验证，并扩展SimbaV2（原无SPL）集成定制SPL模块得到SimbaV2-SPL。

Result: 在11个连续控制任务上，UTD=20时R2R2使TD7提升约22%，在SimbaV2-SPL上带来额外增益，后者达到新的SOTA。

Conclusion: R2R2有效缓解高UTD下的过拟合问题，且与现有方法正交，可推广到不同算法框架中。

Abstract: For reinforcement learning in data-scarce domains like real-world robotics, intensive data reuse enhances efficiency but induces overfitting. While prior works focus on critic bias, representation-level instability in Self-Predictive Learning (SPL) under high Update-to-Data (UTD) regimes remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we propose Robust Representation via Redundancy Reduction (R2R2), a regularization method within SPL. We theoretically identify that standard zero-centering conflicts with SPL's spectral properties and design a non-centered objective accordingly. We verify R2R2 on SPL-native algorithms like TD7. Furthermore, to demonstrate its orthogonality to prior advancements, we extend the state-of-the-art SimbaV2, which originally lacks SPL, by integrating a tailored SPL module, termed SimbaV2-SPL. Experiments across 11 continuous control tasks confirm that R2R2 effectively mitigates overfitting; specifically, at a UTD ratio of 20, it improves TD7 by ~22% and provides additional gains on top of SimbaV2-SPL, which itself establishes a new state-of-the-art. The code can be found at: https://github.com/songsang7/R2R2

</details>


### [277] [Self-Pruned Key-Value Attention: Learning When to Write by Predicting Future Utility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14037)
*Gergely Szilvasy,Manuel Faysse,Maria Lomeli,Matthijs Douze,Pierre-Emmanuel Mazaré,Loïc Cabannes,Wen-tau Yih,Hervé Jégou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SP-KV机制，通过轻量级效用预测器动态筛选KV缓存中高价值键值对，实现3-10倍缓存压缩，显著提升内存效率和解码速度，且几乎不损失模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代测试时计算和智能体范式下，语言模型处理越来越长的序列，Transformer架构的文本生成效率受到KV缓存内存占用和带宽的严重制约。

Method: SP-KV机制：1) 轻量级效用预测器为每个KV对打分；2) 近期KV通过局部窗口始终可用；3) 旧KV对仅当预测效用超过阈值时才写入全局注意力缓存；4) LLM与预测器通过next-token预测损失端到端联合训练，从预训练检查点适配。

Result: 动态稀疏化使KV缓存压缩3-10倍，长序列压缩率更高；显著提升内存使用和解码速度；验证损失和下游任务性能几乎没有下降；揭示了结构化层和头特定的稀疏模式。

Conclusion: SP-KV不仅是有效的KV缓存压缩机制，其揭示的稀疏模式还可用于指导混合局部-全局注意力架构的设计。

Abstract: Under modern test-time compute and agentic paradigms, language models process ever-longer sequences. Efficient text generation with transformer architectures is increasingly constrained by the Key-Value cache memory footprint and bandwidth. To address this limitation, we introduce Self-Pruned Key-Value Attention (SP-KV), a mechanism designed to predict future KV utility in order to reduce the size of the long-term KV cache. This strategy operates at a fine granularity: a lightweight utility predictor scores each key-value pair, and while recent KVs are always available via a local window, older pairs are written in the cache and used in global attention only if their predicted utility surpasses a given threshold. The LLM and the utility predictor are trained jointly end-to-end exclusively through next-token prediction loss, and are adapted from pretrained LLM checkpoints.
  Rather than enforcing a fixed compression ratio, SP-KV performs dynamic sparsification: the mechanism adapts to the input and typically reduces the KV cache size by a factor of $3$ to $10\times$, longer sequences often being more compressible. This leads to vast improvements in memory usage and decoding speed, with little to no degradation of validation loss nor performance on a broad set of downstream tasks. Beyond serving as an effective KV-cache reduction mechanism, our method reveals structured layer- and head-specific sparsity patterns that we can use to guide the design of hybrid local-global attention architectures.

</details>


### [278] [Reliability-Gated Source Anchoring for Continual Test-Time Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14063)
*Vikash Singh,Debargha Ganguly,Weicong Chen,Sabyasachi Sahoo,Sreehari Sankar,Biyao Zhang,Mohsen Harir,Shouren Wang,Osama Zafar,Christian Gagné,Vipin Chaudhary*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RMemSafe是一种可靠性门控机制，通过冻结源模型的归一化预测熵来动态调节源锚定强度，解决CTTA中源模型失效时的"盲目锚定"问题，在CCC-Hard等极端分布漂移场景下显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有源锚定CTTA方法在源模型失效（如CCC-Hard上ResNet-50仅约1.3% top-1准确率）时仍保持相同锚定强度，导致"盲目锚定"（blind anchoring）失败模式。需要一种能够感知源模型可靠性并动态调整锚定强度的机制。

Method: RMemSafe作为ROID的可靠性门控扩展，利用冻结源模型的归一化预测熵作为门控信号：当源后验接近均匀分布（高熵）时关闭门控，消除源锚定和一致性滤波，回退到无源损失（ROID基础损失+边缘校准）；低熵时保持正常源锚定。

Result: 在9个匹配分割的持续腐蚀单元中，RMemSafe+ASR在8个上取得最低错误率，在所有9个上是最优的基于重置的方法。相比ROID+ASR，ResNet-50提升1.05个百分点，ViT-B/16提升0.48个百分点。源退化扫描显示损伤斜率比ROID+ASR浅1.13倍，符合优雅退化的预期。

Conclusion: 熵门控能有效检测高熵源崩溃（而非置信错误的低熵源），实现了源模型失效时从源锚定向无源后备策略的优雅退化，验证了动态源可靠性评估在CTTA中的关键作用。

Abstract: Continual test-time adaptation (CTTA) updates a pretrained model online on an unlabeled, non-stationary stream while anchoring it to a frozen source checkpoint. This anchor is useful only when the source remains reliable. On CCC-Hard, however, a ResNet-50 source falls to approximately $1.3\%$ top-$1$ accuracy, while existing source-anchored CTTA methods continue applying the same anchor strength. We call this failure mode blind anchoring and propose RMemSafe, a reliability-gated extension of ROID that uses the frozen source's normalized predictive entropy to attenuate all explicit source-coupled uses in the objective. When the source posterior approaches uniformity, the gate closes: the source anchor and agreement filter vanish, and the objective reduces to a source-agnostic fallback comprising ROID's base losses plus marginal calibration. Combined with ASR, RMemSafe achieves the lowest error on $8$ of $9$ matched-split continual-corruption cells and is the best reset-based method on all $9$, improving ROID+ASR by $1.05$~pp on ResNet-50 and $0.48$~pp on ViT-B/16. A controlled source-degradation sweep shows a $1.13{\times}$ shallower harm slope than ROID+ASR, consistent with the graceful-decay prediction. The entropy gate detects high-entropy source collapse, not confidently wrong low-entropy sources; this scope is explicitly evaluated and discussed.

</details>


### [279] [Comparative Evaluation of Machine Learning Approaches for Minority-Class Financial Distress Prediction Under Class Imbalance Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14067)
*Karan Sehgal,Khawar Naveed Bhatti*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对金融困境预测中的类别不平衡问题，系统比较了传统统计方法、集成学习（XGBoost、CatBoost、LightGBM、随机森林）和探索性神经网络模型，采用SMOTE过采样技术和SHAP可解释性分析，实验表明梯度提升方法在不平衡条件下对少数类敏感度更优，并强调可复现、可解释和可审计的企业级机器学习流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金融困境预测面临严重类别不平衡问题（困境企业仅占少数），现有方法对少数类预测能力不足，亟需系统比较不同方法在不平衡条件下的表现，并兼顾可解释性和企业治理要求。

Method: 结构化预处理、SMOTE过采样处理不平衡数据，比较经典统计方法、集成学习（XGBoost/CatBoost/LightGBM/随机森林）及神经网络模型，使用SHAP进行特征归因可解释性分析。

Result: 梯度提升方法（XGBoost、CatBoost、LightGBM）在严重不平衡条件下相比基准统计分类器显著提升了少数类（困境企业）的预测敏感度。

Conclusion: 该研究作为应用工程评估，为金融困境预测提供了可复现、可解释、可审计的机器学习工作流框架，适用于企业金融风险环境中的严重类别不平衡场景。

Abstract: Financial distress prediction remains a significant challenge in enterprise risk analysis due to the highly imbalanced nature of real-world financial datasets, where bankrupt or distressed firms typically constitute only a small minority of observations.
  This paper presents a comparative evaluation of classical statistical methods, ensemble learning approaches, and exploratory neural models for minority-class financial distress prediction under class imbalance constraints.
  The study incorporates structured preprocessing, imbalance mitigation using the Synthetic Minority Oversampling Technique (SMOTE), comparative evaluation across ensemble learning architectures including XGBoost, CatBoost, LightGBM, Random Forest, and explainability analysis using SHAP-based feature attribution methods.
  Experimental evaluation demonstrates that gradient-boosting approaches achieved improved minority-class sensitivity relative to baseline statistical classifiers under severe imbalance conditions. The workflow additionally emphasises reproducibility, interpretability, auditability, and governance-oriented machine learning evaluation within enterprise financial risk environments.
  The work is positioned as an applied engineering evaluation intended to support reproducible and interpretable machine learning workflows for financial distress prediction under severe class imbalance constraints.

</details>


### [280] [SurF: A Generative Model for Multivariate Irregular Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14069)
*Mohammad R. Rezaei,Tejas Balaji,Rahul G. Krishnan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SurF 利用时间重标度定理（TRT）将不规则采样的多元事件流转换为独立同分布的指数噪声，提出了一种可跨异构数据集训练、支持长序列的高效生成模型，在多个真实基准上达到最优或接近最优性能，为异步事件流基础模型迈出初步一步。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不规则采样的多元事件流在生成建模中面临两大困难：基于 tokenization 的方法在事件间隔变化几个数量级时失效，而神经时间点过程受限于窗口级别的数值积分瓶颈。现有方法难以跨异构数据集训练单一模型。

Method: (i) 利用时间重标度定理（TRT）作为可学习的双射，将事件序列映射为独立同分布的单位速率指数噪声；(ii) 提出了三种高效的累积强度参数化方法，可扩展至长序列；(iii) 采用基于 Transformer 的编码器实现多数据集预训练。

Result: 在六个真实世界基准上，SurF 在 Earthquake、Retweet 和 Taobao 上实现了最佳时间 RMSE，在其余三个基准上接近强基线模型水平。在严格的留一法评估下，保留的检查点在 5/6 数据集上击败了所有经典和神经自回归基线，并在 Amazon 和 Earthquake 上击败了所有基线。

Conclusion: SurF 通过 TRT 将事件流生成建模转化为简洁的噪声映射问题，克服了传统方法的瓶颈，展现了跨数据集泛化的能力，是异步事件流基础模型方向的重要初步探索。

Abstract: Irregularly sampled multivariate event streams remain a stubbornly difficult modality for generative modeling: tokenization-based approaches break down when inter-event intervals vary by orders of magnitude, and neural temporal point processes are bottlenecked by window-level numerical quadrature. We (i) propose SurF, a generative model that uses the Time Rescaling Theorem (TRT) as a learnable bijection between event sequences and i.i.d.\ unit-rate exponential noise, enabling a single model to be trained across heterogeneous event-stream datasets; (ii) three efficient parameterizations of the cumulative intensity that scale to long sequences; and (iii) a Transformer-based encoder for multi-dataset pretraining. On six real-world benchmarks, SurF achieves the best reported time RMSE on Earthquake, Retweet, and Taobao, and is within trial-level noise of the strongest specialist on the remaining three. Under a strict leave-one-out protocol, the held-out checkpoint beats every classical and neural-autoregressive baseline on 5/6 datasets and beats every baseline on Amazon and Earthquake, an initial step toward foundation models over asynchronous event streams.

</details>


### [281] [AttnGen: Attention-Guided Saliency Learning for Interpretable Genomic Sequence Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14073)
*Rayhaneh Shabani Nia,Ali Karkehabadi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AttnGen是一种注意力引导的训练框架，通过在训练过程中逐步抑制低贡献的核苷酸位置，将可解释性直接嵌入优化过程，在基因组序列分类任务上超越传统CNN基线（96.73% vs 95.83%），并且模型依赖的是一小部分信息丰富的位点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络在基因组序列分类中表现优异，但将其预测与生物学上有意义的序列模式关联起来仍然具有挑战性，现有模型缺乏可解释性。

Method: 提出AttnGen框架：利用注意力机制计算核苷酸级别的的重要性分数，在训练过程中逐步抑制低贡献位置，迫使模型聚焦于紧凑的信息区域，减少对噪声序列元素的依赖。

Result: 在demo_human_or_worm基准上，AttnGen达到96.73%验证准确率（CNN基线为95.83%），收敛更快且训练更稳定；去除高显著性核苷酸后准确率从96.9%降至接近随机水平。

Conclusion: 注意力引导的掩码不仅提升了分类性能，还重塑了模型在序列位置上分配重要性的方式；该方法虽聚焦于短基因组序列，但可能扩展到更复杂的可解释序列建模场景。

Abstract: Deep neural networks have achieved strong performance in genomic sequence classification; however, relating their predictions to biologically meaningful sequence patterns remains challenging. In this work, we present AttnGen, an attention-guided training framework that embeds interpretability directly into the optimization process. AttnGen computes nucleotide-level importance scores using an attention mechanism and progressively suppresses low-contribution positions during training. This encourages the model to focus its predictions on a compact set of informative regions while reducing reliance on noisy sequence elements. We evaluate AttnGen on the standardized demo_human_or_worm benchmark, a binary classification task over 200-nucleotide sequences. With moderate masking, AttnGen achieves a validation accuracy of 96.73%, outperforming a conventional CNN baseline with 95.83% accuracy, while also exhibiting faster convergence and improved training stability. To assess whether the learned importance scores reflect functionally relevant signal, we conduct perturbation-based analysis by removing high-saliency nucleotides. This causes accuracy to drop from 96.9% to near chance level on a 3,000-sequence evaluation set, indicating that the model relies on a relatively small subset of informative positions. Our analysis shows that masking 10--20% of positions provides the most favorable trade-off between predictive performance and interpretability. These results suggest that attention-guided masking not only improves classification performance but also reshapes how models distribute importance across sequence positions. Although this study focuses on short genomic sequences, the proposed approach may extend to more complex interpretable sequence modeling settings.

</details>


### [282] [Fair and Calibrated Toxicity Detection with Robust Training and Abstention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14074)
*Mokshit Surana*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 毒性分类中的公平性涉及排序、校准和弃权三个维度；训练时干预与事后安全机制相互依赖。研究发现：校准差异是隐藏的公平性违规；训练干预只是转移而非消除差异；事后方法继承训练失败模式；弃权本身也不公平。因此需要多轴公平框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 毒性分类公平性通常仅关注排序（如AUC），但校准（置信度可靠性）和弃权（不确定性时拒绝分类）同样关键。现有工作孤立看待训练时干预和事后安全机制，忽略前者决定后者的有效性。本文旨在系统揭示多轴公平性的交互与隐性失败模式。

Method: 比较三种训练方法（ERM、实例级重加权、Group DRO）结合三种事后机制（温度缩放、置信度弃权、身份阈值优化）。评估使用子组AUC、BPSN/BNSP AUC、误差差距、子组ECE及bootstrap置信区间。

Result: (1) ERM全局校准近乎完美(0.013)，但各身份子组校准误差显著(+0.029至+0.134)；(2) 重加权提升排序但校准公平性差距恶化(+0.232)；Group DRO消除子组校准差异但全局失调(ECE 0.118)；(3) 温度缩放失败因非均匀失调；置信弃权在ERM下有效但DRO下风险-覆盖曲线随弃权上升；(4) 弃权对背景内容帮助远大于身份提及内容。

Conclusion: 单一维度（如排序）的公平性改进可能掩盖其他维度（校准、弃权）的失败模式。SRAI公平性需要多轴框架综合评估，不同方法在聚合指标上相似但失败模式可能截然不同，决定真实世界危害程度。

Abstract: Fairness in toxicity classification involves three integrated axes: ranking, calibration, and abstention. Training-time interventions and post-hoc safety mechanisms cannot be evaluated independently because the former determines the efficacy of the latter. We compare Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM), instance-level reweighting, and Group DRO across these axes, combined with temperature scaling, confidence-based abstention, and per-identity threshold optimization. Evaluation uses subgroup AUC, BPSN/BNSP AUC, error gaps, and per-subgroup Expected Calibration Error (ECE) with bootstrap CIs ($n = 1000$).
  We report four findings. (1) Calibration disparity is a hidden fairness violation. ERM has near-perfect aggregate calibration ($0.013$) but is significantly miscalibrated across all identity subgroups ($+0.029$ to $+0.134$). (2) Training interventions reshape rather than eliminate disparity. Reweighted ERM improves ranking (BPSN AUC $+0.06$ to $+0.12$) but worsens the calibration-fairness gap by up to $+0.232$. Group DRO eliminates calibration disparity but only by becoming uniformly miscalibrated globally (ECE $0.118$). (3) Post-hoc methods inherit training failure modes. Temperature scaling fails because miscalibration is non-uniform. Confidence-based abstention works under ERM but breaks under DRO, where the risk-coverage curve rises with deferral. (4) Abstention itself is unfair. Confidence-based deferral helps background content far more than identity-mentioning content. We argue that SRAI fairness requires a multi-axis framework: methods that differ only in aggregate ranking can differ sharply in failure modes that determine real-world harm.

</details>


### [283] [Rethinking Layer Relevance in Large Language Models Beyond Cosine Similarity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14075)
*Cristian Hinostroza,Rodrigo Toro Icarte,Christ Devia,Andres Carvallo De Ferari,Eugenio Herrera-Berg,Denis Parra,Jorge F Silva*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明余弦相似度不能有效衡量LLM中层的实际重要性，并提出使用层移除后的准确率下降作为更可靠的评估指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解LLM内部机制对于开发可解释和优化的架构至关重要，但现有广泛使用的余弦相似度指标在评估层相关性时可能产生误导。

Method: 通过理论分析证明余弦相似度评分与层实际重要性之间可能存在任意低的关联性，并在多个LLM上进行实验验证这种弱相关性，最后提出以层移除后模型准确率下降作为替代指标。

Result: 理论分析表明余弦相似度可任意低但层仍至关重要；实验证实余弦相似度与实际性能下降之间的相关性较弱或中等；层移除准确率下降虽计算成本高但能更准确反映层重要性。

Conclusion: 不应依赖余弦相似度评估层相关性，而应采用层移除后的准确率下降作为更鲁棒的指标，这对模型剪枝和轻量化具有重要意义。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have revolutionized natural language processing. Understanding their internal mechanisms is crucial for developing more interpretable and optimized architectures. Mechanistic interpretability has led to the development of various methods for assessing layer relevance, with cosine similarity being a widely used tool in the field. On this work, we demonstrate that cosine similarity is a poor proxy for the actual performance degradation caused by layer removal. Our theoretical analysis shows that a layer can exhibit an arbitrarily low cosine similarity score while still being crucial to the model's performance. On the other hand, empirical evidence from a range of LLMs confirms that the correlation between cosine similarity and actual performance degradation is often weak or moderate, leading to misleading interpretations of a transformer's internal mechanisms. We propose a more robust metric for assessing layer relevance: the actual drop in model accuracy resulting from the removal of a layer. Even though it is a computationally costly metric, this approach offers a more accurate picture of layer importance, allowing for more informed pruning strategies and lightweight models. Our findings have significant implications for the development of interpretable LLMs and highlight the need to move beyond cosine similarity in assessing layer relevance.

</details>


### [284] [Mini-JEPA Foundation Model Fleet Enables Agentic Hydrologic Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14120)
*Mashrekur Rahman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Mini-JEPAs：一组小型传感器专用联合嵌入预测架构基础模型，由路由代理调度，用于解决通用地球观测模型在专用水文信号上的不足。五个22M参数模型在各传感器上表现优异，路由LLM实现完美命中率，搭配AlphaEarth在物理匹配问题上显著优于单一通用模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用地球科学基础模型（如AlphaEarth）能很好处理宽泛特征，但在专用水文信号上表现不佳，且通常难以获取、成本高昂、需要大规模算力。

Method: 预训练五个22M参数的Mini-JEPA模型（共享ViT骨干、JEPA配方和64维输出空间），分别对应Sentinel-2光学、Sentinel-1 SAR、MODIS热红外、多时相Sentinel-2物候、地形-土壤堆叠。每个模型重建与传感器匹配的变量，并由一个路由LLM根据问题选择合适的传感器。

Result: 高程R²达0.97，温度0.97，降水0.81。地形-土壤与物候模型在土壤湿度、干旱度和降水上对AlphaEarth有增量提升（ΔR²最高0.031）。路由LLM在精选问题集上达到完美命中率。双检索（AlphaEarth+路由舰队）在物理匹配问题上显著优于单用AlphaEarth（Cohen's d=1.10, p=0.031）。

Conclusion: 局部训练的小型传感器专用Mini-JEPAs可以在适度算力下用于水文智能任务，通过路由调度实现优于通用大模型的专业化性能。

Abstract: Geospatial foundation models compress multispectral observations into dense embeddings increasingly used in natural-language environmental reasoning systems. A single planetary-scale model, e.g. Google AlphaEarth, handles broad characterization well but may compromise on specialized hydrologic signals. Such generalist models are also often inaccessible, expensive, and require large-scale compute. We propose Mini-JEPAs: a fleet of small sensor-specialized Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) foundation models consulted by a routing agent for specialized questions. We pretrained five 22M-parameter Mini-JEPAs sharing an identical Vision Transformer backbone, JEPA recipe, and 64-d output space, using Sentinel-2 optical, Sentinel-1 SAR, MODIS thermal, multi-temporal Sentinel-2 phenology, and a topography-soil stack. Each Mini-JEPA reconstructs the variable matched to its sensor, with cross-validated $R^2$ reaching 0.97 for elevation, 0.97 for temperature, and 0.81 for precipitation. The five manifolds differ in geometric structure, with global participation ratios from 8.9 to 20.2 and local intrinsic dimensionalities from 2.3 to 9.0. Joint topography-soil and phenology models add predictive value beyond AlphaEarth alone for soil moisture, aridity, and precipitation ($ΔR^2$ up to 0.031). A router LLM reads per-modality references and selects appropriate sensors with a perfect hit rate over a curated question set. In paired LLM-as-Judge evaluation, dual retrieval over AlphaEarth and the routed fleet outperforms AlphaEarth alone on physics-matched questions (Cohen's $d = 1.10$, $p = 0.031$). Locally-trained Mini-JEPAs can be operationalized for hydrologic intelligence with modest compute.

</details>


### [285] [Reinforcement Learning for Tool-Calling Agents in Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources (FHIR)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14126)
*Marius S. Knorr,Robert Müller,Jan P. Bremer,Nils Schweingruber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在FHIR标准下，使用强化学习后训练CodeAct智能体，提升其在结构化临床图数据上进行多步推理的能力，将答案正确率从50%提升至77%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大语言模型智能体在使用FHIR医疗数据回答临床问题时，经常选错资源或违反遍历约束，导致多步推理效果不佳，亟需一种有效的方法来提升推理的准确性和数据完整性。

Method: 将FHIR上的推理建模为可查询结构化图上的序列决策问题，实现了一个多轮CodeAct智能体，并使用强化学习（RL）对其进行后训练，同时构建了LLM Judge提供基于执行结果的奖励信号。

Result: RL后训练方法将答案正确率从50%（o4-mini）提升到77%（Qwen3-8B），且使用的模型更小、成本更低，同时强制执行了数据完整性约束。

Conclusion: 提出了一个完整的端到端后训练流程（环境构建、工具集搭建、模型训练和自定义评估），能够可靠地提升多轮推理在结构化临床图上的表现。

Abstract: Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources (FHIR) is the dominant standard for interoperable exchange of healthcare data. In FHIR, electronic health records form a directed graph of resources. Answering clinically meaningful questions over FHIR requires agents to perform multi-step reasoning, filtering, and aggregation across multiple resource types. Prior work shows that even tool-augmented LLM agents (retrieval, code execution, multi-turn planning) often select the wrong resources or violate traversal constraints. We study this problem in the context of FHIR-AgentBench, a benchmark for realistic question answering over real-world hospital data, and frame reasoning on FHIR as a sequential decision-making problem over a queryable structured graph. We implement a multi-turn CodeAct agent and post-train it with reinforcement learning using a custom harness and tools. A LLM Judge provides execution-grounded rewards. Compared to prompt-based, closed-model baselines, RL post-training improves performance while enforcing data-integrity constraints. Empirically, our approach improves answer correctness from 50% (o4-mini) to 77% on FHIR-AgentBench using a smaller and cheaper Qwen3-8B model. We present an end-to-end post-training pipeline (environment building, harness construction, model training and custom evaluation) that reliably improves multi-turn reasoning over structured clinical graphs.

</details>


### [286] [bde: A Python Package for Bayesian Deep Ensembles via MILE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14146)
*Vyron Arvanitis,Angelos Aslanidis,Emanuel Sommer,David Rügamer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: bde是一个基于JAX和MILE采样推理方法的Python包，专注于贝叶斯深度集成在表格数据上的高效训练与不确定性量化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了提供用户友好的贝叶斯深度集成工具，使表格数据上的不确定性量化更加高效和易用。

Method: 基于JAX高效实现MILE采样推理方法，提供兼容scikit-learn的估计器，支持快速训练和MCMC采样。

Result: 实现了在回归和分类任务中的快速训练、高效MCMC采样及不确定性量化。

Conclusion: bde是一个高效、易用的贝叶斯深度集成工具，尤其适合表格数据的回归与分类任务。

Abstract: bde is a user-friendly Python package for Bayesian Deep Ensembles with a particular focus on tabular data. Built on an efficient JAX implementation of the sampling-based inference method Microcanonical Langevin Ensembles (MILE), it provides scikit-learn compatible estimators for fast training, efficient Markov Chain Monte Carlo sampling, and uncertainty quantification in both regression and classification tasks.

</details>


### [287] [A Systematic Evaluation of Imbalance Handling Methods in Biomedical Binary Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14147)
*Jiandong Chen,Lingjie Su,Le Peng,Yash Travadi,Rui Zhang,Ju Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究系统评估了五种不平衡处理方法（RUS、ROS、SMOTE、RW、DMO）在生物医学二分类任务中的效果，发现其有效性依赖于模型复杂度和数据模态：对于复杂模型（如BERT、DINOv2）和非结构化数据（文本、图像），ROS、RW和DMO能提升性能，而RUS和SMOTE则持续降低性能；对于简单模型（如逻辑回归）和表格数据，不平衡处理方法无显著优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系统性地探究不平衡处理方法在生物医学二分类中的实际效果，特别是考虑模型复杂度与数据模态的交互影响，以填补现有研究缺乏全面对比评估的空白。

Method: 评估五种IHMs（RUS、ROS、SMOTE、RW、DMO）及RAW基线，在MIMIC-III（表格）、ADE-Corpus-V2（文本）、MURA（图像）三个数据集上，使用从逻辑回归、随机森林到MLP、BiLSTM、BERT、DenseNet、DINOv2等多种复杂度的模型进行对比实验。

Result: (1) 简单模型（如逻辑回归）在表格数据上，IHMs无显著优势；(2) ROS和RW一致提升复杂模型性能；(3) DMO主要对非结构化数据（文本、图像）有效；(4) RUS和SMOTE持续降低性能，不推荐使用。

Conclusion: IHMs的有效性取决于模型复杂度和数据模态，在高复杂度模型上使用ROS、RW和DMO可获得最佳性能增益。

Abstract: Objective: The primary goal of this study was to systematically examine the impact of commonly used imbalance handling methods (IHMs) on predictive performance in biomedical binary classification, considering the interplay between model complexity and diverse data modalities.
  Material and Methods: We evaluated five representative IHMs: random undersampling (RUS), random oversampling (ROS), SMOTE, re-weighting (RW), and direct F1-score optimization (DMO), against a raw training (RAW) baseline.
